faqs.question: Which Medical fields offer the best work-life balance?
faqs.answer:
Some medical field which offe best work and life balance are shown below -
Dentistry (BDS & MDS) – Fixed clinic hours, fewer emergencies.
Pharmacy (BPharm & MPharm) – Less stress compared to hospital-based jobs.
Physiotherapy (BPT & MPT) – Flexible working hours, minimal emergency calls.
Public Health & Community Medicine – Focus on preventive healthcare rather than emergency treatments.
Clinical Research & Medical Writing – Research-based work with no direct patient responsibilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Such an amazing college with great infrastructure that makes highly efficient doctors.

review_content.Placements: There was 80% placement of our batch with a higher package of 10 LPA, and the lowest package being 5LPA. One of my batchmates also got a placement at the ESIC government hospital. The college organised drives for placement in a variety of companies that involved clinical as well as non-clinical roles.
review_content.Infrastructure: All the classrooms are well furnished and equipped with the latest projectors. The infrastructure is also amazing. The hostels are clean and have all the facilities like laundry, gym, and mess. Mess is very clean. The food in the mess tastes amazing and is hygienic.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Sudha Rustagi Tour!

review_content.Placements: 100 students per year enroll in BDS, and 27 students per year in MS. The total fee for the BDS course is 15 lacs at our college. All the students get internships after all the exams in 4 years of the course, and they secure internships in their own OPD. There are various top roles in this course.
review_content.Infrastructure: Good-ventilated air-conditioned lecture halls are provided with smart boards. Labs are well-maintained, with proper space for the students. The library is spacious and equipped with all the necessary materials for the course. Medical facilities are good, as there is a hospital for the college just behind the building.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: An honest review of Sudha Rustagi College of Dental Sciences and Research.

review_content.Placements: Placements were offered in non-clinical work only. There were very few placements because hardly two companies visited this college. The average salary offered was Rs.16,000 per month to Rs.18,000 per month, with which your expenses will not be covered. Unless you have a strong network, you can't get a good placement outside the college. You have to start learning practical concepts in clinics, and these clinics hardly pay you.
review_content.Infrastructure: There was no Wi-Fi facility. A few classrooms were air-conditioned, but it did not work well. The mics in classrooms did not work well. There were common rooms where all students of UG and PG had their lunch. Cleanliness was not up to the mark. The library was a good place with good furniture but had outdated books. You will not get international books for reference on a topic. The books were very few in number. If you have a class, then you are not allowed to sit in the library. There was no air-conditioning. There was a digital library, and it was a room with six outdated computers. They did not work properly. There were power cuts during college hours, so you could not stay in the hostel in the summer. The canteen provided oily food without taste, and limited options were available. There were coolers, but we were not allowed to use them. The principal permitted us to play sports after requesting a lot.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Sudha Rustagi College of Dental Sciences and Research.

review_content.Placements: There are approximately 500 students in my course and 100 students each year. Approximately 100 students get internships every year. The highest package offered is approximately 80,000 per year, the average package is 45,000 per year, and the lowest package is 20,000 per year.
review_content.Infrastructure: The food is average. The infrastructure is not so good. AC facilities are bad. The canteen is bad. Hostel facilities are also bad. Medical facilities are good. Sports and games are very less. Sports and games are played once in a year.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: The college has really good infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: Sudha Rustagi College of Dental Science and Research has a placement rate of approximately 60-70% of students being placed in various private clinics and multinational companies. The highest package offered is up to 5 LPA. The college offers Bachelor's and Master's courses to students.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has all the facilities like washrooms, library, classrooms, and labs. The hostel is very well constructed for students. There are clean washrooms. The students get a safe atmosphere to work there. They have a separate gym and games rooms.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: I do not regret taking admission here. I do not suggest you choose this college for UG.

review_content.Placements: About 4-5 students got placement as it is a professional course, so there is not much in campus placement. The top recruiting company that visited the college in the previous year was Jadoo which hired interns for doing non-clinical work from home, and they are paying a good salary of Rs. 20,000 per month, which is good for fresh graduates.
review_content.Infrastructure: I stayed in the hostel for more than 4 years, and I think it needs a lot of changes and management. The fee for the hostel is more than 1.10 lacs, which is not at all good for the type of food we get over there. There are so much of unnecessary restrictions in the hostel as you need to take permission every time to go out. You do not get Maggi on campus, so you have to go out for that. You cannot go out after 6:30 PM.

description: Sudha Rustagi College of Dental Sciences and Research cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

Sudha Rustagi College of Dental Sciences and Research NEET UG cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final seat allotment result for admission to the BDS course. The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 786132 for BDS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.
Sudha Rustagi College of Dental Sciences and Research BDS cutoff 2025 was 786132 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

Sudha Rustagi College of Dental Sciences and Research accepts the NEET UG entrance exam for selecting students to the BDS course. Candidates with a valid score are then eligible for the NEET UG counselling. For 2026 admission, aspirants must refer to the table below to view some of the important NEET UG 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

Candidates preparing for admission can refer to the table below to view or download the NEET UG round and year-wise consolidated cutoff list. This will help students to understand the past three years' cutoff trends.

On the basis of candidates' performance in the Haryana NEET UG exam, Sudha Rustagi College of Dental Sciences and Research Cutoff 2024 has been released for its third round. The Round 3 cutoff for admission to the BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery was 902972 for the General HS quota. Candidates can find the Round 3 Cutoff for this year along with the last-round cutoff ranks for the previous 2 years to have an overall idea of the Cutoff trends. hostel_campus.college_name: Sudha Rustagi College of Dental Sciences and Research Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: Sudha Rustagi College of Dental Sciences and Research has separate hostel facility for both boys and girls.The hostels are provided with well-furnished rooms with all the required comforts and amenities including hot water, 24-hour power backup, laundry, Wi-Fi connectivity and recreational facilities like television, table tennis, badminton, chess, carom and fully equipped gymnasium in both the hostels. Mess facility is an integral part of the hostel which provides homely and comfortable stay with the sense of camaraderie and fraternity among the students.

Mess facility is an integral part of the hostel which provides homely and comfortable stay with the sense of camaraderie and fraternity among the students.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sudha Rustagi College of Dental Sciences and Research.
reviews.review_text: As the owner of this college, Dharamveer Gupta is a good person who regularly reconstructs and renovates the college. The college had plenty of dental chairs and was in good working condition. Wi-Fi facility was also available for staff and students both in the college building, hospital and hostel. Laboratories were good and the equipment was advanced. The library provides several books on each subject and other medical-related competitive exams. The taste of food at canteen and mess was good a...

reviews.review_heading: Great preclinical teaching.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the college is good. Many departments are now getting renovated. There is ample greenery in the campus area. Hostel facilities are okay. Food is sometimes okay sometimes very bad. There was no variety in the menu. Other features such as rooms, AC, geyser, cleaning were above average. Hostel also has a garden to chill.

reviews.review_heading: It is a dental college in Faridabad.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is up to the mark. It has spacious lecture halls and posting departments fully equipped with dental chairs sufficient for the entire posting batch. Hostels are average. The hostel building is old, so it requires maintenance. Canteen facilities are also available. There is a grocery shop right in front of the college.

reviews.review_heading: Best faculty, average infrastructure .
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure was average as college campus is not so big, classroom condition is bad in summer AC was not working properly no Wi-Fi facility is provided in college, labs are okay not that hi-tech or advance, canteen was not good the food was not good in canteen .

reviews.review_heading: It provides help to train students and supportive teachers along with good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is fair. Wi-Fi is provided in each department for PG course students. It has a big and good ventilated library with lots of informative books and journals. Laboratories are well maintained with coolers in every UG laboratory. Hostel facility is available, but the mess condition is not good as everywhere else. Every lecture hall has an air-conditioner installed and fully ventilated.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sudha Rustagi College of Dental Sciences and Research.
reviews.review_text: There is a Wi-Fi that provides 35 MB of Jio data daily. Speed is fast, i.e., around 5 Mbps. Labs are functioning and are equipped with the necessary equipment, but we need to buy a dental kit, which cost about Rs. 30,000. Classrooms have projectors and air-conditioners. The library is stacked with all dental books only, and there is a digital library. The timing for the library is 6:00 in the evening. Hostel rooms have an almirah, bed, table and chair. Rooms are cleaned 6 days a week in the morn...

reviews.review_heading: I am very disappointed with infrastructure and placements. I am satisfied with the staff members.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college is not reliable, and it is below average. Our college has only 4 lecture halls in which one hall is assigned to every year. Wi-Fi facility is not available in our college and even in the hostel. Our college doesn't provide any facilities for students. The quality of the food served in the hostel is the worst, and many students suffer from food poisoning every year. Air-conditioners don't work in the hostel, and they cut off the electricity for a long time whene...

reviews.review_heading: The college is good for studies and to become a good doctor.
reviews.review_text: All labs like physiology, anatomy, biochemistry, dental anatomy and dental health labs, etc., are available in our college. Departments of all specialisation of dentistry are available here. There is also a huge library. Classrooms are average. There is also a basketball court, badminton court, etc., available in our college. Bakery shop is newly opened, which serves good food quality. There is also a canteen, but it is average. Hostel rooms are average.

reviews.review_heading: It is an average college because of the faculty.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is average. There are many labs such as oral pathology lab, dental lab, microbiology lab, anatomy lab, biochemistry lab etc. Classrooms are average. No sports and indoor games facilities are provided. The hostel facility is available in the college premises, separately for both boys and girls. Hostel rooms are average. A canteen is available, and the quality of food provided there is average. Overall, the college infrastructure needs a lot of improvement.

review_content.Placements: It was a good college. There were about 200 students in our class. The tuition fee was Rs. 60,000 per year. Many students from our batch passed the first-year exams.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our classrooms were neat and comfortable. Labs were well-equipped. Many books and references were available in the library. The mess was good. The quality of food in the mess was good. Sports and games were available.
review_content.Faculty: The course curriculum was according to the NMS rules. They completed the syllabus on time. Our teachers conducted tests after the completion of the portion. content.Placements: Placements are not given on campus. As it is a medical course, an internship is included in the curriculum. The internship lasts for a year, and a stipend of 2000 Rupees will be provided. Afterward, we can pursue postgraduate studies upon passing other exams. The percentage of people who pass the final year exams only can proceed to an internship.

highlights.summary:
MBU all UG/PG Program 2026 Applications Open, Submit Now

The MBUCET Phase 2 2026 exam date has been announced for admission and is scheduled to be held between Apr 22, to Apr 27, 2026.

table.details: Google, Amazon, Accenture, Cisco, Cognizant, DBS Asia, HCL, Deloitte, Hyundai, Infosys, TCS and HashediIn, Tech Mahindra, PwC

college_info.intro:
Mohan Babu University provides MBA, MTech, and BTech as popular programmes at the UG and PG levels. The specialisations include Certified Investment Banking Operations Professional, Business Analytics, Computer Science and Engineering, CSE (AI & ML), Data Science, Cyber Security, Electronics and Communication Engineering, etc.
In addition to that, courses in commerce, computer applications, and pharmacy are also available at Mohan Babu University Andhra Pradesh. The eligibility criteria for MTech involve a 50% marks in Graduation, similarly, a course such as MBA is offered for 2 years with eligibility criteria of 50% marks in Graduation. Besides these two, BTech is offered for 4 years with the eligibility criteria of 45% aggregate in Class 12 with qualification exam scores of JEE Main, MBUCET, or AP EAMCET.
For admission to all the courses, candidates should ensure the fulfilment of the eligibility criteria. Below are the details regarding MBU popular programmes:

student_insights.feedback: Students can work with faculty on research projects
Offered in the final year only
Students are expected to reach out to companies themselves
Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities
Very Active and resourceful, college is also involved

faqs.answer: A:    Yes,  Mohan Babu University is a well known University I Tirupati for offering placement opportunities for courses like MCA, MBA, and BTech, etc. MBU has offered over 6000 placements in over 250 MNCs over the last three years. The key highlights of Mohan Babu University placements for the Class of 2024 are tabulated below:ParticularsPlacement Statistics (2024)the highest packageINR 60 LPATotal offers2,084Total recruiters112Total students placed1,184
faqs.question: Is Mohan Babu University for placements?

faqs.answer: A:    As per the latest report 2024, a total of 112 recruiters participated during Mohan Babu University placements 2024. The top recruiters of Mohan Babu University in 2024 included Google, Infosys, Accenture, Amazon, HCL, TCS, Deloitte, etc. These recruiters placed students of the batch 2024 in various domains with handsome packages.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Mohan Babu University Tirupati courses are offered across different fields of education, which include Engineering, Management, Science, Computer Applications, Pharmacy, Physiotherapy, and Commerce, at the UG and PG levels. Courses such as BSc and MSc offer specialisation in Agriculture and Forensic Sciences, whereas, courses such as BTech offers specialisations such as CSE- AI & ML, ECE, Cyber Security, Electronics and Instrumentation and many more. The courses offered by the university range between 2-4 years.

faqs.answer: A:    Applicants must have a minimum of 55% marks in their bachelor's degree to be eligible for admission to the MBA programme of MBU. The admission is merit-based and based on national-level entrance tests. Applicants having a valid CAT score are considered for direct admission.
faqs.question: What are the eligibility criteria for the MBA programme at Mohan Babu University?

faqs.answer: A:    The general eligibilty criteria for MBU UG courses is that the candidates must have passed class 12 with a minimum 55% marks, in any discipline, from a recognised board. Candidates seeking admission to BTech courses must have studied Maths, Physics and Chemistry as compulsory subjects in class 12 and scored a minimum of 60% marks. For candidates seeking admission to MBU PG courses, the general eligibility is the candidates must have passed graduation in any discipline with a minimum 50% aggregate from a recognised university.
faqs.question: Who is eligible for MBU?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, Mohan Babu Univeristy accepts Andhra Pradesh EAMCET scrores to shorlist candidates for admission to MBU BTech. Interested candidates can apply for the entrance exam through the official website of AP EAMCET. Candidates seeking admission can refer to the table given below to check out the latest year cutoff trends for the General All India category students:Course2023B.Tech. in Electronics and Communications Engineering8932B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering19615B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering9350B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science)14993B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Cyber Security)12401B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning)11221
faqs.question: Does Mohan Babu University accept EAMCET?

faqs.answer: A:    Mohan Babu University determines its admission requirements based on the results of the Andhra Pradesh EAMCET exam. To take admission into various courses in engineering, medicine, and agriculture at MBU, candidates must meet the Mohan Babu University cut off 2023.The overall cutoff for AP-EAPCET is 14735 - 133931 rank.

admission_overview.college_name: Mohan Babu University Admission 2025: Eligibility, Selection Criteria, Admission Process

paragraphs: MBU admissions 2025for all courses are now open. The University accepts applications online through its official website MBU. The eligibility criteria for admission to the University are based on merit and entrance-based criteria. The University administers its entrance examination namelyMBUCET. In addition to the MBU common entrance examination, the University also administers various national-level entrance exams like JEE Main and JEE Advanced for admission to BTech, offered by theMBU School of Engineering and Computing.
Mohan Babu University offers over 50+ courses at the undergraduate level and postgraduate level through six schools and the names of the schools are listed below:

To secure admission to Mohan Babu University courses, the candidates should meet the course-specific eligibility criteria and apply to that course through the official website. The table below mentions the eligibility and selection criteria for Mohan Babu University Courses:

MBU admission processbegins with applying to the course via the MBU official website followed by appearing for the selection process and then receiving the final admission offer. The stepwise detailed MBU admission process is given below:
Step 1: MBU Application Process

Candidates seeking admission at Mohan Babu University need to apply for their desired course through the MBU official website before the application deadline. The candidates need to pay the MBU application fee amounting to INR 500, which is non-refundable.
Step 2: MBU Selection Rounds

Aspirants need to appear for the entrance exam MBU accepts for admission to a particular course. Mohan Babu University conductsMBUCETfor admission to BTech courses.Candidates appearing in the exam must note that MBUCET syllabus is based on Class 11 and Class 12 topics.
Step 3: MBA Final Admission
Selected candidates need to pay the admission confirmation fee to secure their seats

faqs.question: What are the admission criteria for the BTech programme at Mohan Babu University?
faqs.answer: Admission to the BTech degree at MBU is entrance-based. The candidate should be qualified in MBUCET, or alternatively, can apply based on their JEE Main, JEE Advanced, or APEAMCET scores. The course is presented in full-time mode with a duration of four years. Satisfaction of the eligibility criteria and holding a valid score in the entrance exam is compulsory for admission.

faqs.question: What is the duration and mode of study for the BTech programme at Mohan Babu University?
faqs.answer: The BTech course at Mohan Babu University is a four-year undergraduate programme. It is provided in full-time mode under the School of Engineering and Computing. The course consists of theoretical knowledge, practical training, and industry-based learning. Practical experience is gained through labs, projects, and internships.

faqs.question: Who is eligible for MBU?
faqs.answer: The general eligibilty criteria for MBU UG courses is that the candidates must have passed class 12 with a minimum 55% marks, in any discipline, from a recognised board. Candidates seeking admission to BTech courses must have studied Maths, Physics and Chemistry as compulsory subjects in class 12 and scored a minimum of 60% marks.For candidates seeking admission to MBU PG courses, the general eligibility is the candidates must have passed graduation in any discipline with a minimum 50% aggregate from a recognised university.

faqs.question: How much rank is required for admission at Mohan Babu University through AP EAMCET?
faqs.answer: Mohan Babu University determines its admission requirements based on the results of the Andhra Pradesh EAMCET exam. To take admission into various courses in engineering, medicine, and agriculture at MBU, candidates must meet the Mohan Babu University cut off 2023.The overall cutoff for AP-EAPCET is 14735 - 133931 rank.

placement_data.title: Mohan Babu University Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: The Career Development Centre (CDC) of Mohan Babu University is primarily focused on assisting students in developing their ability to assess opportunities and understand the actions, decisions, and information necessary to transform a job opportunity into a significant career milestone. MBU has offered over 6,000 placements in over 250 MNCs over the last three years.

Recently, Mohan Babu University has concluded the placements for the Class of 2024. As per the latest report, 112 recruiters participated in the placement process and offered 2084 job offers to the batch 2024. The highest package offered during Mohan Babu University placements in 2024 stood at INR 60 LPA . This package was offered by Google. Further, Amazon offered the second highest package of INR 45 LPA. Additionally, 45% of students were placed in MNCs with packages exceeding INR 6 LPA. The top recruiters of Mohan Babu University in 2024 included Google , Infosys, Accenture, Amazon, HCL, TCS , Deloitte , etc.

hostel_campus.college_name: Mohan Babu University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description:
24/7 supply of water and electricity., CCTV monitoring and security guards. 
Wi-Fi and internet facilities inside the campus.
1000 Rooms are available

library.description:
The Central library of MBU is the one of the biggest treasures and a remarkable place for the reader's community. It serves the prime objective of supporting the academics and research programs of the institute by offering various physical and online resources. 

Spread across three centrally air-conditioned floors, the library has Wi-Fi and caters to the reading capacity of six hundred readers. It is home to a massive collection of 1,42,422 volumes and approx. 22,000 titles. The library has a fully automated Integrated Library Management System (ILMS) through KOHA software for all the library-related services and an RFID based circulation system. 

The Central Library proudly possesses a magnanimous collection of various textbooks, E-books, E-journals from paramount publications across many genres and subjects, along with video lectures. It has everything you need to quench your thirst for knowledge. The library also has high-quality reprographics and print facilities. The Digital Library is equipped with sixty high configuration computers.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Squash Court, Volleyball Court

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty, strict rules. More feels worst food, no enjoyment.
reviews.review_text: Forest food, good rooms, good infrastructure and the facilities are available in the subject Analog Electronics in the place of IPS. We are in a meeting with the team and we will be upgraded to Platinum Debit Cars and this is the first option for you.

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructures is very good.
reviews.review_text: Libraries are pretty good in our university. The hostel facilities are average and comfortable for students. The food in the mess and canteen is good, though sometimes it could be better. Medical facilities are available in campus if a student falls sick. The sports and game facilities are nice, and students can play different games to stay healthy and enjoy their free time. They also take us to tournaments.

reviews.review_heading: Dream, believe, and achieve.
reviews.review_text: We have very good infrastructure in our college. Library is the best part of our college. They provide Wi-Fi too. Faculty in Mohan Babu University are above average. They have good content and more information about subjects. Hostels are not that good but we can stay. The food they provide is average. In Mohan Babu University, they conduct many games and also take us to other tournaments.

reviews.review_heading: Offers good infrastructure, average faculty, and improving placement opportunities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and hostel are pretty impressive and good. We have been provided with a very vast and extraordinary library. The college also has a very big playground. They conduct sports days and encourage sports by congratulating students with trophies, and also provide free education for state-level and national-level players.

reviews.review_heading: It's the best option to take admission in our college. Infrastructure and hostel facilities are nice
reviews.review_text: Facilities are very good in the hostel and college. They provide all the needed infrastructure to the students, and all are very clean and neat. Food is also not bad, and it is average in my opinion, and the college looking wise is very nice, and no other issues regarding facilities.

reviews.review_heading: The year with a lot of future goals and memories upcoming.
reviews.review_text: My hostel is 4-room sharing. It is good, ventilated, and comfortable. We have emergency services along with it. Sometimes we have fun activities, and we have a good food menu and 24/7 Wi-Fi. We also have CCTV cameras and washing machines to wash clothes, and we also have many permissions.

reviews.review_heading: The college life is good, I would rate it 5 star.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is very good. It feels very aesthetic. You can enjoy your college life. When it comes to college, it is very pleasant. College hostels are very good and spacious, and the fee is high. But the infrastructure for both college and hostel is good.

reviews.review_heading: I like my college and I do not regret joining.
reviews.review_text: In my hostel fee structure is good. Food is not good and many students are suffering from health issues due to the inequality in maintaining food quality. Most people are facing this situation in every hostel not adjusting. Rooms are sufficient, but not properly cleaned.

reviews.review_heading: It's a waste of college and a waste of money to invest, so I don't suggest this college.
reviews.review_text: I didn't like anything in my college library, which is just awesome, but the faculty and the rest are the worst. I don't suggest that anyone join this college for any of them. Faculty doesn't know anything. Only some of the faculty are knowledgeable persons.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure is very good.
reviews.review_text: The libraries in our university are good. Hostel facilities are comfortable for students. The food in the mess and canteen is mostly good, though sometimes it could be better. Medical facilities are available on campus for students who fall sick. Sports and game facilities are nice, allowing students to stay healthy and enjoy their free time.

reviews.review_heading: Dream. Believe. Achieve. Good infrastructure, a central library, Security, and highly equipped labs.
reviews.review_text: Mohan Babu University is in the 150-200 band for its facilities and infrastructure. It is about 100 acres of land, a vast area. When it comes to labs, they are highly equipped with the latest and updated versions of equipment. The central library contains all domains of books, discussion halls, etc. The mess canteen and medical facilities are rated 4 out of 5. Regarding sports and games, there is a huge ground where students play all kinds of sports.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure and good placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and hostel are pretty impressive and good. They provide labs and all necessary instruments to the students. The library in our college is the most attractive thing in our college. We have many hostels in and out of the campus, and they provide us with good food. We also have a canteen. The ambiance and the food in the canteen are too good. We also have sports. They even conduct sports days, and they take the students who are interested in games to tournaments held in other sta...

reviews.review_heading: My university is good for improving our knowledge. It is a good environment to learn things.
reviews.review_text: We have free Wi-Fi, attached washrooms, and daily cleaning in the rooms and washrooms, and hygienic food. We have a library which is the centre of attraction in the whole campus, which is full AC on three floors, and we have a canteen which is named the Pops Canteen, and the college is full of free Wi-Fi.

reviews.review_heading: There are good facilities and good infrastructure. The placements are good.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available in our department, like Wi-Fi and labs, are good. Mainly, the library is very good. The mess, canteen, medical facilities, sports, and games are good. The hostels in Mohan Babu University were so good. Mainly, the washroom is cleaned daily.

reviews.review_heading: I'm not completely satisfied.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are not bad, but they have not reached our expectations. Wi-Fi trouble us sometimes. The best thing we have and we can use is the library, which contains more facilities. Spending more time there is great. The food tastes good sometimes, and worse sometimes, it depends. Coming to hostels, it's not as much as we expected.

data.description: Mohan Babu University has experienced faculty with many international educators on the campus. The faculty includes of over 500 teaching and 1,000 non-teaching staff members. The majority of our teaching staff hold doctoral degrees from top global institutions. The campus welcomes reknown international faculty members contributing through guest lectures, enriching both academic and research. This exchange provides a culture of ongoing learning and collaboration among students and faculty.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Sri Kalabyraveshwara Ayurvedic Medical College and Hospital is an institute which offers various courses at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time programmes from stream such as Medicine & Health Sciences. At the UG level, students can choose the available programmes such as B.A.M.S. Talking about PG level, some of the available courses include MD. The fee structure for the Sri Kalabyraveshwara Ayurvedic Medical College and Hospital programmes is around INR 3,01,500 to 3,40,875.

review_content.General: There are a total of 100 students in a batch. The highest package offered was 26 lacs for management students and the lowest was 40000 which was a government seat. The B.A.M.S. course has a duration of 5 and a half years which includes an year of internship. After this, a doctorate degree will be provided to the students.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college campus is very small if we compare it to the other colleges like SDM and Sri Sir college. The classrooms are well built and have very good ventilation along with good speakers and projectors available. It also includes hostel which is very affordable and the food is also very good.

reviews_list.batch_info: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: A perfect teaching staff ruined by the system and management.

review_content.Placements: No placements after fulfilment of the course. One has to wander upon and go about their own talent based searching for jobs. No help from college authority as well. But due to name of the college finding a job is easy. As the college is linked to trust run by swamyji the reputation is good.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is okay. Not the best institute, but hospital is good. No compound, no cafeteria, no specific lab for diagnosis as well. Classrooms are equipped with projectors which doesn't work, also broken curtains, aged benches and desk. No appropriate podium for the lectures as well.

reviews_list.review_title: I am most satisfied, and I like it.

review_content.Placements: Usually, 100 students get admission per batch, so there are 400 UG students per batch, which is the first year, second year, third year and final year. The highest salary package offered is 6 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is Rs. 60,000 per annum, which is based on management seats and government seats.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is the best, and now it is being renovated along with an attached hospital side by side. There are hostel facilities nearby, and the library is also renovated, which has a separate floor for UG, PG and faculty members. There is also a separate canteen.

The highest salary package offered is 6 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is Rs. 60,000 per annum, which is based on management seats and government seats.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is the best, and now it is being renovated along with an attached hospital side by side. There are hostel facilities nearby, and the library is also renovated, which has a separate floor for UG, PG and faculty members. There is also a separate canteen.

individual_reviews.course: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied because of the teaching faculty, good patient flow, good results.

content.Placements: Maximum 80% of students are getting jobs. The minimum package is eight thousand rupees per month. Most students opt for post-graduation as well as practicing in their own clinics. Many of them go for research purposes. There is more scope for our college students.
content.Infrastructure: Teaching faculty is very good, spacious classrooms and smart classes are there. All the latest editions are available in the library. Digital library is also there in our college. All the equipment is available in the labs. Hostel food is good, and cleanliness is there. Clean wards in the hospital.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Ayurvedic College, SKAMC Bangalore.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not that good. The campus is small. But provides all the facilities that a college should have. All the labs classes are equipped with a smart board and projectors for easy teaching. The hostel for that matter is a little far from college. But bus facility is provided by the college for girls. But boys have to walk .

reviews.review_heading: SKAMC: Review of the ayurveda college.
reviews.review_text: The college campus is very small if we compare it to the other colleges like SDM and Sri Sir college. The classrooms are well built and have very good ventilation along with good speakers and projectors available. It also includes hostel which is very affordable and the food is also very good.

reviews.review_heading: A perfect teaching staff ruined by the system and management.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is okay. Not the best institute, but hospital is good. No compound, no cafeteria, no specific lab for diagnosis as well. Classrooms are equipped with projectors which doesn't work, also broken curtains, aged benches and desk. No appropriate podium for the lectures as well.

reviews.review_heading: I am most satisfied, and I like it.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is the best, and now it is being renovated along with an attached hospital side by side. There are hostel facilities nearby, and the library is also renovated, which has a separate floor for UG, PG and faculty members. There is also a separate canteen.

The KEAM 2026 registration for admission to the BE/BTech and BPharma courses is now over. The exam for the same will be conducted from Apr 13, 2026, to Apr 25, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Pushpagiri Group of Institutions is an institute which offers various courses at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time programmes from streams such as Medicine & Health Sciences and Nursing. At the UG level, students can choose the available programmes such as B.Pharma, BDS and MBBS. Talking about PG level, some of the available courses include M.Sc., MD and MS. The fee structure for the Pushpagiri Group of Institutions programmes is around INR 2,00,000 to 58,27,500.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Our college is academically the best.

review_content.Placements: Every student is sent for placements across the state. Other courses include dental, nursing, pharma, anesthesia, radiology, and other paramedical courses sent for placements. All MBBS pass outs are practicing medicine or doing higher studies in the country or abroad.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has the best academic system. There is the best environment for studying.
review_content.Faculty: There are the best faculty members from various institutions and have no flaws in teaching and training. Apart from teaching mentors make studying easier and more enjoyable. The course curriculum is hectic and tough. Hard work and constant stress are experienced. They provide excellent training for university exams and are supportive.

reviews_list.review_title: Fun and enthusiastic college life with good faculty.

review_content.Placements: Most of the students got placed in our institutions. Some of them cleared USMLE, PLAB and got opportunities abroad. Salary package averages between 3,60,000 to 5,00,000 p. a. Also there are internship facility for all the students. There are also PG courses available in the institution .
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi available, laboratories and classrooms are well maintained and equipped with all necessary items. Library facility is quite good. We also had a seperate reading hall for 200 students at a time. Hostel facilities are good. Also, sports and games are a part of curriculum .

review_summary.college_name: Pushpagiri Group of Institutions Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Doctor of Pharmacy (Pharm.D.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: A small review of my college.

content.Placements: Placement assistance has been given for students but there was a campus placement interview conducted. The lowest offered is about Rs. 5,000 per month. The highest salary offered is around Rs. 30,000 per month. It is the initial package provided for a pharma. D graduated from a hospital in Kerala. Top recruiting companies include Cipla, etc. Internships are provided in the hospital of our college itself. Students get one year of internships which a stipend of Rs. 5,000 per month. The tuition fee is paid for internships which is Rs. 1,90,000. Clinical pharmacist, industrial pharmacist, and hospital pharmacist are some roles after the course.

individual_reviews.course: Doctor of Pharmacy (Pharm.D.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: My personal opinion about my college.

content.Placements: The number of students who got placed through campus recruitment is very few. Though campus placement assistance is provided, but companies coming for recruitment are less. The percentage of students getting placed is 30%. They get good salary packages as beginners. The college has a tie-up with some pharma companies. Top recruiting companies are Cipla, Sunpharma, etc. Internships are provided at the management-owned medical college hospital. Top roles offered in the course are clinical pharmacist, clinical research associate, pharmacovigilance, etc.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Our college is academically the best.

content.Placements: Every student is sent for placements across the state. Other courses include dental, nursing, pharma, anesthesia, radiology, and other paramedical courses sent for placements. All MBBS pass outs are practicing medicine or doing higher studies in the country or abroad.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has the best academic system. There is the best environment for studying.
content.Faculty: There are the best faculty members from various institutions and have no flaws in teaching and training. Apart from teaching mentors make studying easier and more enjoyable. The course curriculum is hectic and tough. Hard work and constant stress are experienced. They provide excellent training for university exams and are supportive.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Fun and enthusiastic college life with good faculty.

content.Placements: Most of the students got placed in our institutions. Some of them cleared USMLE, PLAB and got opportunities abroad. Salary package averages between 3,60,000 to 5,00,000 p. a. Also there are internship facility for all the students. There are also PG courses available in the institution .
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi available, laboratories and classrooms are well maintained and equipped with all necessary items. Library facility is quite good. We also had a seperate reading hall for 200 students at a time. Hostel facilities are good. Also, sports and games are a part of curriculum .

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: College experience at Pushpagiri.

content.Placements: Placements are relatively fewer. Placements for Pharmaceutical companies and industries are very limited. Placements for hospital and retail pharmacy or drug stores come very often. The placement cell is getting more active and has had more placements and job offers recently. Internships are provided.
content.Infrastructure: There is a Wi-Fi facility in the college, but there is no such facility in the girls' hostel. Laboratories are moderately equipped, but there is a need for more improvement. The library is well-equipped with reference and standard textbooks. Mess is average during my period of study, but has improved now.

description: Pushpagiri Group of Institutions NEET SS Cutoff 2024 was released for the concluding round in the form of ranks for admission to DNB course across multiple specialisations. The cutoff was released for various categories belonging to the AI quota.

While for the last round, the closing rank was 301 wherein DNB in Critical Care Medicine proved to be the most sought-after in the General AI category. Students can check the first and last round closing ranks from the table provided below.
In this section, candidates can find out the category-wise NEET SS cutoff 2024 and 2023. In 2024, for the General AI quota, the NEET SS cutoff was closed at 301 for DNB in Critical Care Medicine.
For more in-depth details for the previous year cutoffs, please refer to the table provided below and make use of the filters available to refine your search on the basis of rounds and category.

NEET SS is the accepting exam for Pushpagiri Group of Institutions admission to various Super Speciality Courses. Candidates appearing for NEET SS can refer to the table below to view the important NEET SS 2025 dates.
Students can view or download the round and year-wise consolidated NEET SS cutoff PDFs for Pushpagiri Group of Institutions. This will help students to understand the year-wise cutoff trends.

Pushpagiri Group of Institutions Cutoff 2025 has been released for Round 4 for all categories under the HS quotas for admission to MDS. The Round 4 cutoff ranged from 12279 to 17430, where MDS in Pedodontics was the hardest specialisation for the General HS category students. In contrast, MDS in Periodontology was the easiest specialisation to gain admission.
In this section, students can find Pushpagiri Group of Institutions MDS cutoff 2025, as well cutoff data for 2024 and 2023 for various categories, specialisations, and rounds.

In Round 4, 2025, for the General HS category, MDS in Pedodontics was the hardest specialisation to get admission to, followed by MDS in Periodontology, with closing ranks of 12279 and 17430, respectively.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Pushpagiri College of PharmacyReviewed on 23 Jan 2025)
reviews.review_heading: A small review of my college.
reviews.review_text: The college has good facilities like classrooms, laboratories, a library, and Wi-Fi. The library contains many study materials, textbooks, reference books, and previous year question papers. Textbooks can be taken outside the library using the library card. Hostel facilities are provided within the campus itself. The quality of food is only average. There are canteens outside the hostel within the campus. Sports and games are conducted every year under the initiative of the college union.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Pushpagiri College of PharmacyReviewed on 23 Jan 2025)
reviews.review_heading: My personal opinion about my college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are quite good. The college has good infrastructure. Though the building is a bit old, it is renovated periodically. There is Wi-Fi on campus which can be used for study purposes. Classrooms are equipped with projectors. The college has a well-furnished library. The hostel building is a bit old. The mess is okay. Non-vegetarian is provided every day. Rarely there are some issues regarding food. There are two cafes on the campus which are decent and good. The college gives importance t...

reviews.review_heading: Our college is academically the best.
reviews.review_text: Our college has the best academic system. There is the best environment for studying.

reviews.review_heading: Fun and enthusiastic college life with good faculty.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi available, laboratories and classrooms are well maintained and equipped with all necessary items. Library facility is quite good. We also had a seperate reading hall for 200 students at a time. Hostel facilities are good. Also, sports and games are a part of curriculum .

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Pushpagiri College of PharmacyReviewed on 18 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: College experience at Pushpagiri.
reviews.review_text: There is a Wi-Fi facility in the college, but there is no such facility in the girls' hostel. Laboratories are moderately equipped, but there is a need for more improvement. The library is well-equipped with reference and standard textbooks. Mess is average during my period of study, but has improved now.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Pushpagiri College of PharmacyReviewed on 26 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Overall experience after 4 years.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure have been overall average for the college. Most of the laboratory equipment and raw materials are kind of average only. They provide Wi-Fi mainly for project and practice schoolwork. The library is well-maintained. Hostel facilities are also average.

highlights.summary:
The NEET MDS 2026 exam date has been set as May 2, 2026 (tentatively) for RajaRajeswari Dental College and Hospital admission to the MDS course. The registrations for the same are expected to start soon.

A few more updates are given below:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: RajaRajeswari Dental College and Hospital offers a wide range of programmes at both UG and PG levels. With option for Full Time learning, students can choose from stream such as Medicine & Health Sciences. At the UG stage, courses available include BDS. For the PG level, there is a wide range of courses like MDS. RajaRajeswari Dental College and Hospital fee structure ranges between INR 3,83,232 to 11,18,478.

faqs.answer: A:    No, you cannot  complete MDS course at RajaRajeswari Dental College and Hospital in one year. The duration for this course is of two years. Candidates must study for the respective time in order to complete thsi course. Additionally, they must appear for the NEET PG exam to apply for admission in this course and appear for the counselling process also.
faqs.question: Can I complete MDS course at RajaRajeswari Dental College and Hospital in one year?

faqs.answer: A:    Studying MDS at RajaRajeswari Dental College and Hospital might be expensive since it is a private college located in Bangalore. Tuitions of MDS are from INR 6 to INR 12 lakhs per year. There are fees for exams, hostel charges, etc. Though the cost is a bit on the higher side, good faculty experience, advanced infrastructure, and clinical training make it a good investment for anyone seeking quality dental education and good career prospects.
faqs.question: Is pursuing MDS at RajaRajeswari Dental College and Hospital expensive?

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: It is a good college with good facilities and clinical exposure.

review_content.Placements: Our course includes an internship (4+1) in its curriculum, and both the college and teachers prepare students for the outside world. Both BDS and MS are good in our college. The stipend is not given during internships. A total of 8 departments are available for specialisations, and other courses are also available. Our college is quite famous in Bangalore.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has good facilities, including a library, Wi-Fi, the latest dental machines and instruments. The campus is a little small. The food served in the hostel mess is average, but the canteen is good for students. Patient flow is very good in the college, and the clinical practice is also very good.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: It is the best college with good infrastructure and placements as compared to the fees we pay.

review_content.Placements: Around 90% of the students got placements in the last 2 years. The highest salary package offered was 32.5 LPA. Alibaba and Insavlign are some companies which visited in our college. Around 80-90% of the students get selected in the campus interview. The average salary package offered in our course is 5 LPA to 10 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good and well-equipped. High-speed Wi-Fi is available. The library is also well-equipped with a good amount of books and fully air-conditioned. Hostels are clean and tidy. Hostel mess served tasty food, and classrooms are also good with projectors.

overview_faqs.answer: Rajarajeshwari Dental College and Hospital is one among the better institutions to pursue MDS courses for those students seeking comprehensive clinical training and exposure. faqs.question: How many specialisations are there under MDS course at RajaRajeswari Dental College and Hospital?
faqs.answer: MDS course at RajaRajeswari Dental College and Hospital is offered in nine specialisations. They are as follows:-Oral Pathology & MicrobiologyPublic Health DentistryOrthodontics and Dento-Facial OrthopedicsConservative Dentistry and EndodonticsPedodontics and Preventive DentistryOral and Maxillofacial SurgeryProsthetics & Crown and BridgeOral Medicine and RadiologyPeriodontology

faqs.question: Is RajaRajeswari Dental College and Hospital good for MDS?
faqs.answer: Rajarajeshwari Dental College and Hospital is one among the better institutions to pursue MDS courses for those students seeking comprehensive clinical training and exposure. This college is affiliated to Rajiv Gandhi University of Health Sciences and has an excellent academic curriculum under elite facilities. Specializations include Oral Surgery, Periodontics, and Prosthodontics under MDS fields. It has many tie-ups with renowned hospitals for giving practical exposures. The institution is ext

faqs.question: Can I complete MDS course at RajaRajeswari Dental College and Hospital in one year?
faqs.answer: No, you cannot  complete MDS course at RajaRajeswari Dental College and Hospital in one year. The duration for this course is of two years. Candidates must study for the respective time in order to complete thsi course. Additionally, they must appear for the NEET PG exam to apply for admission in this course and appear for the counselling process also.

courses_data.name: RajaRajeswari Dental College and Hospital BDS Admission 2025
courses_data.description: RajaRajeswari Dental College and Hospitaloffers 5 yearsBDS. Admission to the course is based on a valid score in NEET. The total tuition fee for BDS isINR 3,83,232. The institute offers admission in 100 seats of BDS.

faqs.question: What all specialisations is BDS course offered in at RajaRajeswari Dental College and Hospital?
faqs.answer: The BDS course offered at RajaRajeswari Dental College and Hospital has one specialisation that the candidate can study, this is, Prosthetics and Crown and Bridge. Candidates must ensure fulfilling the eligibility criteria for this course before applying for admission. Admissions to this course are entrance-based, as scores of the NEET exam are accepted.

faqs.question: Should I join BDS course at RajaRajeswari Dental College and Hospital?
faqs.answer: Joining RajaRajeswari Dental College and Hospital for BDS course is generally considered a decent option. Candidates must consider factors like infrastructure, faculty experience, hostel and mess facilities, curriculum, etc. while taking admission. They can apply online or offline for admission at RajaRajeswari Dental College and Hospital.

faqs.question: What is the duration of BDS course at RajaRajeswari Dental College and Hospital?
faqs.answer: The duration of BDS course at RajaRajeswari Dental College and Hospital is five years. This includes- four years of academics and one year of internship. Candidates must appear for the NEET UG exam to apply for admission in this course. Additioanlly, they must also esnure fulfilling the eligibility criteria for BDS course at RajaRajeswari Dental College and Hospital.

faqs.question: Can I take direct admission in RajaRajeswari Dental College and Hospital?
faqs.answer: No, direct admission is not possible in RajaRajeswari Dental College and Hospital. Admissions to the various courses offered by the college are entrance-based. Candidates must appear for the entrance exams accepted by the college to take admission in their preferred course. These include- NEET, PhD entrance exams and the RajaRajeswari Dental College and Hospital's own entrance exam for certificate course.

highlights.summary:
The NEET PG 2026 exam date has been set as Aug 30, 2026 (tentatively) for admission to the MD, MS, and PG Diploma courses.

A few more updates are given below:

college_info.intro: CBLU offers a comprehensive range of programs that serve over 50,000+ students of different academic needs. Popular CBLU courses are spread across the 11 faculties. Sought-after courses include names like MA, MBA, MEd, MSW, MSc, MSc Mathematics, BPharma, MPharma, among several other academic degrees. Students who are interested in sports careers can check out the Master of Physical Education (MPEd) program. This program prepares the student with a solid foundation in sports or sports management.

faqs.answer: A:    The leadership at Chaudhary Bansi Lal University Bhiwani is led ex-officio by the Governor of the State of Haryana. The Vice-Chancellor, Prof. Deepti Dharmani, is the head of the university and handles the day-to-day functioning of the institution. More than 22 teaching departments and 11 faculties are present at CBLU. 66 colleges affiliated with CBLU Bhiwani have their own faculties and leaderships. The Registrar at Ch Bansi Lal University is Dr. Bhavna Sharma.
faqs.question: Who are the top leadership at Ch Bansi Lal University Bhiwani?

faqs.answer: A:    Chaudhary Bansi Lal University (CBLU) delivers its UG programme through B.Sc., B.Com., B.A., BBA, BCA and B.Tech qualifications. Fee costs depend on the chosen course and field of study at Chaudhary Bansi Lal University.Annual fees for B.Sc. programs span from Rs 8000 to 15000 based on the selected subject. The annual fees for B.Com. and B.A. programs at CBLU fall within the range of Rs 7,000 to Rs 12,000. Students need to spend Rs 20,000 to Rs 35,000 annually for either BBA or BCA programs.The annual costs to study B.Tech. fall within Rs 50,000 to Rs 80,000 based on the specific branch. Students must pay separate fees for exams together with library fees and hostel fees that cost from Rs 30,000 to Rs 50,000 every year. The institution provides scholarships which combined with fee concessions for students from reserved categories.
faqs.question: What is the fees for UG courses at Chaudhary Bansi Lal University?

faqs.answer: A:    Chaudhary Bansi Lal University conducts Research Aptitude Test or CBLU RAT for admission to PhD programme. The test consists of 50% questions on research methodology and 50% questions are subject specific. The question paper is of 100 marks and consists of multiple chpice questions. The university conducts the test at centres notified by CBLU. Besides, the university also accepts GPAT, GATE, JRF, NET, etc. for admission to specific courses.
faqs.question: Does CBLU Bhiwani conduct entrance exam for admission?

faqs.answer: A:    Aspirants need to pay an application fee to apply for a course at Chaudhary Bansi Lal University. Aspirants can pay the fee via any of the online payment modes. reviews_list.review_title: In my opinion, students should not take admission to this college.

review_content.Placements: None of the students get placed in our course so if students are searching for placements then they should not come to this college. If there is no placement then there will be no package and there will be no companies too. No companies will come to provide internships. Top roles are not offered in our course.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is only okay and not so good at our college. There is Wi-Fi in our college, but the Wi-Fi doesn't have high speed. Classrooms do not have AC and the library doesn't have silence in it. Hostels are bad too like class and fans don't work properly in it.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: All things are good, but placements are too slow.

review_content.Placements: Companies for internships as well as placements are coming to select candidates. However, the process has been affected in the past year due to changes in the placement officer. Now, the new placement officer is working too fast to provide good placement opportunities for students enrolled in this course.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel has good infrastructure and a good environment, with each student having their room. Facilities such as proper drinking RO water are available at all times. Proper facilities of hygienic bathrooms and toilets are provided here. Proper care of students is maintained here.

faqs.answer: Chaudhary Bansi Lal University selects candidates for most courses based on their merit in the qualifying exam. The university conducts a Research Aptitude Test for admission to PhD programme. Besides, the university considers GPAT scores for MPharm admission. Once selected, candidates are alloted seat in the university. Aspirants have to pay a course fee to confirm their seat in the university.
faqs.question: Q: How can I get a seat at CBLU Bhiwani?

faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for Chaudhary Bansi Lal University MBA is INR 77,700. This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change. Aspirants have to pay the course fee to confirm their seat in the university. Besides, candidates also need to pay an application fee of INR 800 to register for the course.
faqs.question: Q: What is the fee for MBA at CBLU?

faqs.answer: Studying MBA at Chaudhary Bansi Lal University (CBLU) costs lower than fees charged by private universities. The MBA course tuition fee at CBLU spans between Rs 60,000 to Rs 80,000 during a two-year period based on student category and specialisation selection.The yearly expenses for students after tuition fees at CBLU consist of registration fees plus examination fees combined with library fees together with miscellaneous expenses ranging from Rs 5,000 to Rs 10,000 yearly. Students who choose to stay in the hostel should expect annual fees between Rs 25,000 and Rs 40,000 including meal costs. Qualified education scholarships exist specifically for students who belong to reserved categories as well as economically challenged sections. The MBA programme at CBLU provides students with an affordable choice for pursuing management education.
faqs.question: Q: What is the fee structure for MBA in Chaudhary Bansi Lal University?

faqs.answer: Yes, Chaudhary Bansi Lal University offers a two-year full-time MBA course at the PG level. The course is divided into four semesters. Candidates are selected for MBA programme based on their merit in the last qualifying exam. Aspirants after completing graduation can apply for the MBA course.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. LLB. - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely dissatisfied with faculty and staff. Main thing is that parking facility is not there.

content.Placements: Placements were not so good. 30 to 35 percent of students were placed. The highest package was Rs 40,000, and minimum was Rs 8,000. Its very difficult to survive in life after taking a degree from this college because the education system was very bad. Placements were very low, and students were facing a lot of problems there.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of college campus was good. Hostel was not so good, it was in bad condition. The rooms in the hostel were so small. There was no place to park vehicles inside the college, and vehicles were also not allowed to enter the college. There was no facility for auto inside college so students faced many problems.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Arts (B.A.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Review of Adarsh Mahila Mahavidyalaya.

content.Placements: As per the B.A. degree, relatively expected placements are low, as most students opt for higher education, or they prefer professional courses. The average package ranges from 3-5 LPA. The top companies that recruit students are generally local companies in the city. Approximately 30-35% of students get internships.
content.Infrastructure: The campus has a Wi-Fi facility and well-made labs. Classrooms are big and well-accommodated. The library is well-stocked with books and highly resourceful. The hostel food is good. The college campus has a canteen, and it is the best thing. There is a full garden, and the college is surrounded by greenery all around.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: In my opinion, students should not take admission to this college.

content.Placements: None of the students get placed in our course so if students are searching for placements then they should not come to this college. If there is no placement then there will be no package and there will be no companies too. No companies will come to provide internships. Top roles are not offered in our course.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is only okay and not so good at our college. There is Wi-Fi in our college, but the Wi-Fi doesn't have high speed. Classrooms do not have AC and the library doesn't have silence in it. Hostels are bad too like class and fans don't work properly in it.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: All things are good, but placements are too slow.

content.Placements: Companies for internships as well as placements are coming to select candidates. However, the process has been affected in the past year due to changes in the placement officer. Now, the new placement officer is working too fast to provide good placement opportunities for students enrolled in this course.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel has good infrastructure and a good environment, with each student having their room. Facilities such as proper drinking RO water are available at all times. Proper facilities of hygienic bathrooms and toilets are provided here. Proper care of students is maintained here.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: There are no placements, and you should not take admission to this college.

content.Placements: The placement scene at our college is really disappointing. There are zero campus placements and no help with finding internships. The placement cell doesn't do much and students are left to figure things out on their own. It's frustrating especially when you expect some support for your career from the college, and they don't provide any placements or internships.
content.Infrastructure: The food in our mess is just terrible, tasteless, oily, and the same boring stuff every day. Half the time, it's not even fresh. Eating here feels like a punishment. The infrastructure is average. Hostels don't have AC for the summer, making them feel like the worst.

faqs.question: What is the fee for MBA at CBLU?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for Chaudhary Bansi Lal University MBA isINR 77,700.This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change. Aspirants have to pay the course fee to confirm their seat in the university. Besides, candidates also need to pay an application fee of INR 800 to register for the course.

faqs.question: Is MBA available at CBLU?
faqs.answer: Yes, Chaudhary Bansi Lal University offers a two-year full-time MBA course at the PG level. The course is divided into four semesters. Candidates are selected for MBA programme based on their merit in the last qualifying exam. Aspirants after completing graduation can apply for the MBA course.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for MBA at CBLU?
faqs.answer: Candidates who have passed BCom/ BBA/ BTM/ BIM/ Bachelor of Arts/ Science with Economics/ Mathematics or any other examination recognised by state universities of Haryana as equivalent with at least 45% aggregate are eligible to apply for the MBA course. Candidates must hold the documents proving their eligibility for verification at the time of admission.

faqs.question: What all documents are required to be submitted for CBLU Bhiwani application?
faqs.answer: Candidates seeking admissions into the various CBLU courses can visit the official admissions portal of the website. After registering themselves at the CBLU Bhiwani portal, the students must submit their educational details and proceed to the Document Upload section. There they would be required to submit the following relevant documents:Photograph and Signature10th/12th certificates, and UG Mark Sheets.Aadhar CardDomicile Certificate (if applicable)Income Certificate (if applicable)Weightages

faqs.question: How can I get a seat at CBLU Bhiwani?
faqs.answer: Chaudhary Bansi Lal University selects candidates for most courses based on their merit in the qualifying exam. The university conducts a Research Aptitude Test for admission to PhD programme. Besides, the university considers GPAT scores for MPharm admission. Once selected, candidates are alloted seat in the university. Aspirants have to pay a course fee to confirm their seat in the university.

faqs.question: Does CBLU Bhiwani conduct entrance exam for admission?
faqs.answer: Chaudhary Bansi Lal University conducts Research Aptitude Test or CBLU RAT for admission to PhD programme. The test consists of 50% questions on research methodology and 50% questions are subject specific. The question paper is of 100 marks and consists of multiple chpice questions. The university conducts the test at centres notified by CBLU. Besides, the university also accepts GPAT, GATE, JRF, NET, etc. for admission to specific courses.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for various courses at CBLU Bhiwani?
faqs.answer: Chaudhary Bansi Lal University eligibility criteria varies course-wise. Candidates applying for UG courses must pass a minimum of Class 12 and graduation for PG courses. Below is the eligibility criteria for top CBLU courses:CourseCommon EligibilityMBABCom/ BBA/ BTM/ BIM/ Bachelor of Arts/ Science with Economics/ Mathematics or any other examination recognised by state universities of Haryana as equivalent with at least 45% aggregate (42.7% aggregate for SC/ ST/ Blind/ Visually Disabled)M.EdB.Ed/ BA B.Ed/ BSc B.Ed/ B.EI.Ed/ D.EI.Ed with UG degree with at least 50% aggregate (47.5% aggregate for SC/ ST/ Blind/ Persons with Differently Abled and Visually/ Hearing impaired candidates of Haryana)MPharmBPharm with at least 55% aggregate (52.5% aggregate for SC/ ST/ Blind/ Visually/ Differently Abled, etc.)B.EdBachelor's Degree and/or the Master'sDegree in Sciences/Social Sciences/Humanity with at least 50% aggregate (47.5% aggregate for SC/ ST/ Blind/ Persons with Differently Abled and Visu

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission for various courses at CBLU Bhiwani?
faqs.answer: Chaudhary Bansi Lal University offers admission based on merit of the candidates in qualifying exam or entrance test. Aspirants need to first register for the preferred course to participate in the selection process. Admission to most of the programmes is based on qualifying exam score of the aspirants. The university considers entrance test scores for MPharm and PhD programmes.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by B.R.C.M. Law CollegeReviewed on 31 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied with faculty and staff. Main thing is that parking facility is not there.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of college campus was good. Hostel was not so good, it was in bad condition. The rooms in the hostel were so small. There was no place to park vehicles inside the college, and vehicles were also not allowed to enter the college. There was no facility for auto inside college so students faced many problems.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Adarsh Mahila MahavidyalayaReviewed on 20 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Review of Adarsh Mahila Mahavidyalaya.
reviews.review_text: The campus has a Wi-Fi facility and well-made labs. Classrooms are big and well-accommodated. The library is well-stocked with books and highly resourceful. The hostel food is good. The college campus has a canteen, and it is the best thing. There is a full garden, and the college is surrounded by greenery all around.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by BRCM College of Engineering and TechnologyReviewed on 6 Jun 2025)
reviews.review_heading: In my opinion, students should not take admission to this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is only okay and not so good at our college. There is Wi-Fi in our college, but the Wi-Fi doesn't have high speed. Classrooms do not have AC and the library doesn't have silence in it. Hostels are bad too like class and fans don't work properly in it.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by BRCM College of Engineering and TechnologyReviewed on 8 May 2025)
reviews.review_heading: All things are good, but placements are too slow.
reviews.review_text: The hostel has good infrastructure and a good environment, with each student having their room. Facilities such as proper drinking RO water are available at all times. Proper facilities of hygienic bathrooms and toilets are provided here. Proper care of students is maintained here.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by BRCM College of Engineering and TechnologyReviewed on 8 May 2025)
reviews.review_heading: There are no placements, and you should not take admission to this college.
reviews.review_text: The food in our mess is just terrible, tasteless, oily, and the same boring stuff every day. Half the time, it's not even fresh. Eating here feels like a punishment. The infrastructure is average. Hostels don't have AC for the summer, making them feel like the worst.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2019Offered by BRCM College of Engineering and TechnologyReviewed on 1 May 2025)
reviews.review_heading: A very good college for studying.
reviews.review_text: The faculty and labs are good. Projectors are available in every class, and every faculty member has their cabin. Each department's teachers are very friendly with the students. The transport department has teachers and sports coaching available as well. The college has a gym where students can work out.

reviews.review_heading: It has decent infrastructure and campus life. It needs progress in teachers and industry exposure.
reviews.review_text: Chaudhary Bansi Lal University offers Wi-Fi-enabled campuses, well-equipped labs, spacious classrooms, and a resourceful library. Hostels provide basic amenities, with decent food in the mess and canteen. Medical facilities are also available on campus. Sports grounds and events support recreation.

reviews.review_heading: Disappointed by the behavior of teachers.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available in the university. Labs are good too; every equipment is available in the laboratory, and as the university is new, the equipment is fresh too. The canteen is also there, but don't expect healthy food, though the food is tasty. There is also a library for studying.

reviews.review_heading: Very good Faculty for every course.
reviews.review_text: Good hostel facilities, lab facilities, and sports grounds are available for players who are capable. Excellent choice of books is present at the library. The canteen is available on campus and near the entry gate. Medical facilities are there for every emergency. The classrooms are neat and clean.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by BRCM College of Engineering and TechnologyReviewed on 12 Jul 2024)
reviews.review_heading: A Comprehensive Insight into Computer Science at BRCM CET.

college_info.college_name: CBLU Bhiwani Scholarship Details

paragraphs: Chaudhary Bansi Lal University does not offer scholarships. Students pursuing a course from CBLU can apply for the scholarships offered by the state or central government. Below are the scholarships available:

SC students pursuing a course from Chaudhary Bansi Lal University can apply for Post-Matric Scholarship offered by the Government of Haryana. SC students whose parent's annual income is not more than INR 2.5 lakh. Students need to apply for the scholarship on the official website of Social Welfare Department, Govt. of Haryana.

The total tuition fee for Chaudhary Bansi Lal University MBA is INR 77,700. This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change. Aspirants have to pay the course fee to confirm their seat in the university. Besides, candidates also need to pay an application fee of INR 800 to register for the course.

Aspirants need to pay an application fee to apply for a course at Chaudhary Bansi Lal University. Aspirants can pay the fee via any of the online payment modes. Below is course-wise application fee for CBLU:
INR 800 for General/ EWS/ ESM/ FF
INR 200 for SC/ ST/ DSC/ BC-A/ BC-B/ PwBD of Haryana State
