review_summary.college_name: Government Pharmacy Institute, Gulzarbagh Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Value for money and it is better than private colleges.

content.Placements: 75% of students are placed from this college. The highest package is INR 3 lacs per annum, the lowest package is about INR 1.5 lacs per annum, and the average package is INR 2–2.5 lacs per annum. Top recruiters from this college are Cipla, Mankind, etc. About 100% of students get internships at companies like Sun Pharmaceutical Industries Ltd. The top roles offered in my course are quality control, pharmaceutical research, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-fi facilities are not available here; classrooms are new; and libraries are also available here. Hostels are totally new and mess facilities are available here. Food is also good, but in hostels, mandatory facilities like medical, sports and games activities are not available.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It's a average college with average ranking and sometimes, even below average acts.

content.Placements: Almost 70% of the student got internships. The average package is around 2.5 LPA, the minimum is 1LPA and the highest is 5LPA. Companies like Sun Pharma and Alkane visit here. A lot of people got placed in the field of research and development of medicine.
content.Infrastructure: Except Wi-Fi, almost everything is available. All the kinds of labs and equipments are available. The library is really good and the labs are well maintained and modern. Almost all the students get hostel facility. Sports equipments are available and the college campus has quite a decent space. Canteen is not available and medical facility isn't available. Campus crowd is decent.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: It is a good government college with good infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: There is no specific placement cell here. But many alumni are in reputed pharmaceutical companies. Students need to search for placement on their own. Since it is a pharmacy college you can get placement in top companies. You can also go for M. Pharma by cracking entrance exams. In the upcoming year, our college wilL also offer an M. pharma course.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms, library, laboratory, hostel, college campus, and everything is good. But the front building of the college is old. There is one old hostel which is only for boys. Currently, no girls' hostel is available. Two hostels are under construction, one for boys and one for girls.

reviews.review_heading: Best government. Pharmacy college in Bihar.
reviews.review_text: Our college is established in the year 1958 by health department, government. Of Bihar. It is the premier pharmacy institution with D. Pharma and B. Pharma courses. The college is well-equipped with excellent infrastructure of permanent buildings with state of art facilities ( Laboratories, Lecture hall and all required equipment).

reviews.review_heading: Our college should improve in providing facilities, and there is no space for any events.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi facility on our campus. The laboratory is not available with materials. There are some very old materials which have stopped working. We don't have any mess, canteen, sports and extracurricular facilities at our college.

reviews.review_heading: Taking a short review. College is overall good.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is quite good. All the necessary requirement are available like library, classrooms, auditorium etc. Hostel is new and is well maintained. Separate hostel for boys and girls. Quality of food is normal. Medical facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: Placements are not good enough, but teachers are knowledgeable. The crowd campus is average.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good, and the classrooms are spacious. There is no Wi-Fi facility, but two huge libraries are available. Earlier our college had a hostel only for boys, but now new hostels for both boys and girls are under-construction. Sports equipment is available, but there is no canteen in our college.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the college in all aspects.
reviews.review_text: Facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and library are well-equipped. Food served is healthy and nutritious. Mess and canteen are in good conditions. Medical facilities are available as it's a medical institute. Indoor games like volleyball, badminton, chess, and carrom are available for students.

reviews_list.batch_info: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Our college has good faculty members, but the infrastructure is bad.

review_content.Placements: In this college, at the time of internships we get local area hospital duties, and many students get opportunities to work in the village. As in internship students get in-half experience by working with many senior doctors, consultants and get knowledge from it. By working in the hospital for at least 1 and half years many students get job opportunities and get self-independent. This college provides much help to poor people in terms of treatment, medicine, etc. At least 60 patients daily come to get treatment from this. Many patients stay for 2to 3 months for full treatment. Many patients visit the hospital for Panchkarma therapy which is popular in our college. Many students from our batch get opportunities to work in our college and learn a lot of things. Every kind of branch of Ayurveda such as Kriya, Rachna, ras shastra department, Charak department are available to do. PG courses are also available in Shri Ayurved College.

overview_faqs.question: Is Shri Ayurved Mahavidyalaya a good college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Shri Ayurved Mahavidyalaya is a reputed institute for Ph.D., MD, B.A.M.S.. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in Medicine & Health Sciences. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. Shri Ayurved Mahavidyalaya has a review rating of 3.2 on the basis of reviews by students. In addition to this, it has been rated 3 on campuslife, 3 on placements, 4 on faculty and 2 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Shri Ayurved Mahavidyalaya Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Our college has good faculty members, but the infrastructure is bad.

content.Placements: In this college, at the time of internships we get local area hospital duties, and many students get opportunities to work in the village. As in internship students get in-half experience by working with many senior doctors, consultants and get knowledge from it. By working in the hospital for at least 1 and half years many students get job opportunities and get self-independent. This college provides much help to poor people in terms of treatment, medicine, etc. At least 60 patients daily come to get treatment from this. Many patients stay for 2to 3 months for full treatment. Many patients visit the hospital for Panchkarma therapy which is popular in our college. Many students from our batch get opportunities to work in our college and learn a lot of things. Every kind of branch of Ayurveda such as Kriya, Rachna, ras shastra department, Charak department are available to do. PG courses are also available in Shri Ayurved College.

admission_overview.college_name: Shri Ayurved Mahavidyalaya Admission 2025: Fees, Courses, Eligibility and Selection

paragraphs: Shri Ayurved Mahavidyalaya admissions are entrance-based. The institute accepts scores in NEET and AYUSH, etc.Shri Ayurved Mahavidyalayaoffers courses at UG level in Medicine and Health Sciences stream. The institute offers B.A.M.S. for 66 months in various specialisations. Candidates can fill out the application form online for admission.

The total tuition fees for UG course isINR 2,30,400. Aspirants have to pay the programme fees at the time of admission to confirm their seat in the institute. The total fees may also include other components such as caution deposit, hostel fees, etc.

description: The Shri Ayurved Mahavidyalaya BAMS Cutoff 2024 has been published for Round 4. The cutoff for the BAMS was published category-wise for General, OBC, SC, ST, EWS and PWD category candidates. Inferring the Round 4 Shri Ayurved Mahavidyalaya AYUSH NEET UG cutoff 2024, for the AI quota, closing rank for General category students was 91863. The most sought-after course as per the cutoff list is BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery.

Shri Ayurved Mahavidyalaya cutoff 2024 has been released, for the fourth round for the candidates seeking admission to the NEET UG course. As per the AYUSH NEET UG Round 4 Seat Allotment Result, the most in-demand course was BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery with a cutoff rank of 91863 for the students belonging to the General AI category.

Shri Ayurved Mahavidyalaya admission to the UG courses is based on valid AYUSH NEET UG scores, followed by a counselling round. A direct link will be provided below to download the counselling result for AYUSH NEET 2024 counselling.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Law (L.L.B.) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: All about Kamla Nehru, Sultanpur.

review_content.Placements: In LL.B., there are no such placements. I can't say about the highest, lowest, or average placement as there is no placement. Students are recurated by local advocates. Every student has to do an internship, which they can get by their own contact; you have to visit the door.
review_content.Infrastructure: The faculty is pretty good and has knowledge about subjects. The faculty will always be there for you in difficult situations. Infrastructure is also good. The college has a good lab but does not have Wi-Fi facilities, which they lack. The quality of the hostel is pretty good and easy to live in.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc in Agriculture - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: My college facilities are good.

review_content.Placements: My college placement is very poor, with only 30 percent of students placed in my course. The highest package is INR 3 lacs per year the lowest package is INR 1 lacs per year and the average package is INR 1.8 lacs per year offered in my course. A top recruiting company like SEED Technologies offered jobs.
review_content.Infrastructure: My college facility is good but the infrastructure is not good and the very poor infrastructure of my college building is not well maintained. The Wi-Fi speed is good and there is a small gym in my college. All classroom fans are present but the electricity connection is not good.

overview_faqs.question: Is Kamla Nehru Group of Institutions a good college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Kamla Nehru Group of Institutions is a reputed institute for BBA, B.Sc., M.Sc., B.Com, M.Com, M.A., B.A., B.P.Ed, D.Ed, BCA, MBA/PGDM, B.Tech, B.Pharma, M.Pharma, MCA. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in Business & Management Studies, Science, Accounting & Commerce, Humanities & Social Sciences, Teaching & Education, IT & Software, Animation, Design, Hospitality & Travel, Medicine & Health Sciences, Engineering, Banking, Finance & Insurance, Law, Nursing. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. Kamla Nehru Group of Institutions has a review rating of 4.3 on the basis of reviews by students. In addition to this, it has been rated 4.2 on campuslife, 3.9 on placements, 4.5 on faculty and 4.2 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Kamla Nehru Group of Institutions Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Botany - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Teachers are highly qualified and knowledgeable.

content.Placements: Our college provides good opportunities for students. Average students get placed at this college. Students get opportunities in the research and development fields. The average package offered in the college ranges between 4-6 LPA. Students also get internships at the college.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good. College facilities are well-maintained and of good quality. Classrooms are big enough with proper seating. Labs, library, Wi-Fi, and various other facilities are available for the students. Multiple sports facilities are given to the students. Hostel facility is also given to the students.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc in Agriculture - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The college is very awesome.

content.Placements: I don't know the exact percentage of students who are placed in a company but at least 150 students get placed under a company every year. The highest package that is offered in my course is around 22 LPA, and the average package is about 6-7 LPA. To be honest, I don't know the company's name, but they are kind of agrochemical companies and they generally belong to Haryana, Gujarat, Assam and Pune. In the government sector, generally people go for a forest officer and food inspector and in private, there are field administrative officers, and many posts are offered by the companies.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Law (L.L.B.) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: All about Kamla Nehru, Sultanpur.

content.Placements: In LL.B., there are no such placements. I can't say about the highest, lowest, or average placement as there is no placement. Students are recurated by local advocates. Every student has to do an internship, which they can get by their own contact; you have to visit the door.
content.Infrastructure: The faculty is pretty good and has knowledge about subjects. The faculty will always be there for you in difficult situations. Infrastructure is also good. The college has a good lab but does not have Wi-Fi facilities, which they lack. The quality of the hostel is pretty good and easy to live in.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc in Agriculture - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: My college facilities are good.

content.Placements: My college placement is very poor, with only 30 percent of students placed in my course. The highest package is INR 3 lacs per year the lowest package is INR 1 lacs per year and the average package is INR 1.8 lacs per year offered in my course. A top recruiting company like SEED Technologies offered jobs.
content.Infrastructure: My college facility is good but the infrastructure is not good and the very poor infrastructure of my college building is not well maintained. The Wi-Fi speed is good and there is a small gym in my college. All classroom fans are present but the electricity connection is not good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc in Agriculture - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: My college faculty members are good.

content.Placements: My college placement is good and 70 percent of students placed in my course. In my course, the highest package is INR 5 lacs per annum the lowest package is INR 2 lacs per annum and the average package is INR 3.8 lacs per annum. The top role in my course is in the agriculture department.
content.Infrastructure: The facility and infrastructure available in my department are good, with good Wi-Fi speed, good labs and classrooms, good painting, and a library available. The quality of facilities in my hostel is good and boys and girls have separate rooms, but the mess is the same.

admission_overview.college_name: Kamla Nehru Group of Institutions Admission 2025: Fees, Courses, Eligibility and Selection

admission_process.title: Kamla Nehru Group of Institutions Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Kamla Nehru Group of Institutions admissionis based on both merit or exam scores of the candidates. Besides, Kamla Nehru Group of Institutions considers scores in JEE Main, CUET, and CUET-PG for admission to specific courses.Kamla Nehru Group of Institutionsoffers courses at the UG, PG, After 10th and Certificate levels.
The college offers UG programmes for 42 months - 4 years. For programmes at PG level, the duration is 1 year - 2 years.
The total tuition fee for UG programmes isINR 19,000 - 3,50,000. Likewise, the PG programmes fee isINR 1,22,400 - 1,53,000. Students can pay the fee amount via online or offline mode.
Please note that this fee information is obtained from the official website/ sanctioning body but is subject to change.

cut_off.college_name: Kamla Nehru Group of Institutions Cutoff 2025: Check UPTAC Round Wise Cutoff Ranks

description: Kamla Nehru Group of Institutions cutoff 2025 has been announced for admission to BTech programme for all categories and rounds in the both the All India and Home State quota. Students can scroll to the exam-wise sections below for details about Kamla Nehru Group of Institutions UPTAC Cutoff 2025 and other exams. A few more exam-related updates are in the pointers below:

The Kamla Nehru Group of Institutions cutoff 2024 was concluded for JEE Main with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as the opening and closing ranks for admission to the BE/BTech, courses. During the Kamla Nehru Group of Institutions BE/BTech cutoff 2024, the last-round closing ranks ranged between 563961 and 971998 for the General AI category students. Of all the BE/BTech specialisations, the one that faced fierce competition was B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engin

The JEE Main cutoff 2024 was released for the General, OBC, ST, SC, EWS, and PWD categories in the AI quota. reviews.review_heading: Teachers are highly qualified and knowledgeable.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. College facilities are well-maintained and of good quality. Classrooms are big enough with proper seating. Labs, library, Wi-Fi, and various other facilities are available for the students. Multiple sports facilities are given to the students. Hostel facility is also given to the students.

reviews.review_heading: The college is very awesome.
reviews.review_text: There are several kinds of facilities offered in my course & infrastructure, as the infrastructure is very good. Classes are taken over a smart board and the lab practicals are also done by the professor so that we can resolve our queries and perform well in exams. In my college, there are also Wi-Fi facilities is also offered and there is a huge library where a variety of books is offered to us, which saves our money as expensive books are offered to us without any cost, which saves our money.

reviews.review_heading: All about Kamla Nehru, Sultanpur.
reviews.review_text: The faculty is pretty good and has knowledge about subjects. The faculty will always be there for you in difficult situations. Infrastructure is also good. The college has a good lab but does not have Wi-Fi facilities, which they lack. The quality of the hostel is pretty good and easy to live in.

reviews.review_heading: My college facilities are good.

reviews.review_heading: My college faculty members are good.

reviews.review_heading: My college has good placement and facility.

The Wi-Fi campus has good speed, laboratories are available, and libraries are available. The quality of the facilities in my hostel is very good; all boys and girls rooms are separate.

reviews.review_heading: Good facilities and placements are available at my college.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good placements and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides good facilities and infrastructure. Wi-Fi is available. Labs and classrooms are available. Fans are available in all classrooms. The library is good. The hostel and canteen are excellent. The quality of food in the canteen is good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good placements and facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good placements and facilities.

reviews.review_heading: My college is good for any course. Good teacher and good facilities.
reviews.review_text: My college's facilities are good. All facilities are available at my college: Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and libraries. Fans are available in good-type classrooms. My hostel facilities are good, and my room has a fan and a water supply that are properly maintained. My hostel food is of good quality, and medical faculty are available in my college hostel.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college because of its facilities.

The hostel facility is available in our college. The food served in the hostel is average. Medical facilities are available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Kamla Nehru Group of Institutions.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college was not good. The buildings were old. Desks and benches also needed to be changed. The college was basically situated between jungles. You can find too much greenery and grass on the campus, not like in the stadiums, but like on barren land.

reviews.review_heading: The college provides a good education for the courses.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are good. Our class runs in first building of college, in which Wi-Fi speed is good and lab is for B.Pharma students only. Classroom was well maintained. Library was full of books in which you can easily get books without any charge, but after 15 days, late fees are charged. If hostel facilities did not provide food, you would have to self-cook your own food. Room is large enough for two students to live comfortably. Canteen was available and sports. College gave ma...

reviews.review_heading: This college provides great infrastructure, and atmosphere is also good.
reviews.review_text: This institute has a great atmosphere. Wi-Fi is enabled on campus, and it has a great network of roads. It also provides a huge playground for various outdoor sports. A cafeteria is also available for indoor sports. The classrooms are large and it is well-ventilated. The laboratories are also available. In the hostel, it provides a 24X7 electric supply. The food served in the mess is average.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: A.J Institute of Dental Sciences offers various programmes at UG and PG levels. Students can choose offline courses from stream such as Medicine & Health Sciences. At the UG level, students can choose from courses, namely BDS. On the other hand, at the PG level, the AJIDS Mangalore offers MDS and PG Diploma. The fees for AJIDS Mangalore courses range between INR 3,83,232 to 11,18,478.

review_content.Placements: There are approximately 100 students in each year. Our course is for 4 years, followed by a 1-year internship, which can only be completed in our college. Our yearly fees are about 3,50,000, and college fees are about 90,000, which makes about 15 Lacs for all 4 years, whereas for merit students, it can be about 90,000 per year.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college provides a library, a gym, a football court, a computer library or E-library, and many other sports courts, canteens, and food courts. It is placed in the heart of the city, so it helps students be easily accessible to their requirements. The quality of food is average, and the infrastructure has recently been renewed.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: I am in my second year now. Staff are strict. The college is very strict regarding attendance.

review_content.Placements: Around 100 student seats are available at our college. The majority are girls. It is the favorite college for Keralites and Karnataka locals. The college is well developed with a dummy for UG, and patients initially are not provided. Students who work on dummies will only be allowed to treat patients in their third year.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college includes AC study halls, libraries, labs, clinical labs, and excellent infrastructure. Hostels don't provide Wi-Fi connections. Provides individual bathrooms for each room (AJ Boys Hostel). But hostel conditions are different for girls. Kind of poor condition for girls hostels.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Happy with campus, facility, fest and events.

review_content.Placements: There is no placement option in this dental course, but most of the graduate students work in various other renowned clinics of the city. Some of them have established their own clinics in various parts of the state and are doing good to themselves. There is no specific role offered to someone in this course, you can establish your own clinic and be everything of it or else you can work in someone's clinic as a consultant.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classes are equipped with ACs, and there is enough ventilation. There is Wi-Fi but students don't have access to it as of now. Library facilities are available. There is a canteen inside the college itself. The food in hostel is much better compared to most of the other places. About sports, college campus has an indoor stadium for TT. There is basketball court, volleyball court, throwball court, and cricket ground, and also football goal post in the same ground. There are TT setup inside hostel also.

reviews.review_heading: AJ institute for students.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides a library, a gym, a football court, a computer library or E-library, and many other sports courts, canteens, and food courts. It is placed in the heart of the city, so it helps students be easily accessible to their requirements. The quality of food is average, and the infrastructure has recently been renewed.

reviews.review_heading: I am in my second year now. Staff are strict. The college is very strict regarding attendance.
reviews.review_text: The college includes AC study halls, libraries, labs, clinical labs, and excellent infrastructure. Hostels don't provide Wi-Fi connections. Provides individual bathrooms for each room (AJ Boys Hostel). But hostel conditions are different for girls. Kind of poor condition for girls hostels.

reviews.review_heading: Happy with campus, facility, fest and events.
reviews.review_text: Classes are equipped with ACs, and there is enough ventilation. There is Wi-Fi but students don't have access to it as of now. Library facilities are available. There is a canteen inside the college itself. The food in hostel is much better compared to most of the other places. About sports, college campus has an indoor stadium for TT. There is basketball court, volleyball court, throwball court, and cricket ground, and also football goal post in the same ground. There are TT setup inside hostel...

faqs.answer: A:    The fee bracket for programs offerred by the ACPM Medical College is approximately INR 895000 - INR 3156527.
faqs.question: What is the fee range for the courses offered at ACPM Medical College?

review_content.Placements: In this college, there are a total of 100 students in this course. In internships, the salary package offered ranges from Rs. 10,000-15,000 per month maybe, or also it can vary. Many roles are offered in different departments present here like ophthalmology, gynecology, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is not provided here. Labs are very good with all the apparatus. Classrooms are also good with enough benches. It has a big and separate library but is not allowed for 1st year students. The hostel is good for food, and Sabji provided by them is very nice. They use a lot of oil, and chapatis are raw and not good.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: I recommend students to take admission to this college.

review_content.Placements: Our college comes under the Maharashtra University of health and medical sciences. After completing MBBS, students can join PHC, clinic, or hospital or opt for PG.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college consists of designated departments for various subjects, a library, a digital library, Wi-Fi, well-equipped classrooms, and separate labs for every department. The hospital area is provided with wards, ICU, a blood bank, etc. Sports ground is available. The quality of food served in the mess is good. There are 2 to 3 canteens.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Great, can be considered in good colleges with low fees compared to others.

review_content.Placements: Most of the students are eligible for government medical seats as medical officers in rural areas, and a few go for the NEET PG exam to secure an MD in various branches. MBBS is the most expensive course, and medical officers generally earn up to 80k per month, and after PG, more can be learnt.
review_content.Infrastructure: Labs and classrooms are good, college is old, so not that shiny infrastructure and Wi-Fi facility for hostel is not available, and quality of food at the mess is decent, and games like volleyball, cricket, and football are played regularly. Recently, they built turf for us.

reviews_list.review_title: I am not absolutely dissatisfied. It's like 50-50.

review_content.Placements: There are not many students who got placed, all of them went for higher studies, and the remaining are recruited by a Private Bank and another company, not as many as other colleges, and there are fewer internships in this college. review_content.Infrastructure: The classrooms are not good as shown in the image, and the library is also not good, and the gym is not good, and the video of the gym is also viral for not working equipment, and the Wi-Fi really works, and it is very low speed, mess, and the canteen food is like every canteen food.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Physics - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Life of a student at Mahatma Gandhi Kashi Vidyapith, Varanasi.

review_content.Placements: 250 students are placed in my batch. I am doing a B.Sc. in Physics in pure science. Many of the students who will study in this university are working for a top leading company in the world. But percentage is so small. Two or three people out of hundred go into this place. Recently, 23 students at the university have been selected by a software company. I don't know the name of company but you can search on Google.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facility and infrastructure of my university are awesome because you can do anything in the lab without restriction. Faculty members are so helpful and friendly. Library is medium means size of department but books are so huge. I do not live in hostel but hostel life is the best. Some of my friends live in hostel. There is one big ground in university. You can play anything in this ground.

overview_faqs.question: Is MGKVP a good option for LLB?
overview_faqs.answer: One of the verified students’ reviews available for LLB at MGKVP on Shiksha mentions, the faculty members are very good. They are knowledgeable. The teaching quality is very good. They implement simple and normal methods and the student-to-faculty ratio is 60:1”. While another review mentions, “ Low-end infrastructure with a very poor quality of internet/Wi-Fi, labs are dull, the classrooms are okay but not up to the mark. It is a vintage-style building as it was made in the mid-1900s. So, you can guess the type of infrastructure”. Considering both viewpoints, it can be considered a decent option and also a not-so-decent option for LLB. However, the final decision depends on the aspirant and the factor that is more important to them. Check out more reviews on MGKVP LLB course here.

review_summary.college_name: MGKVP Varanasi Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelors in Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: My college teachers are good and supportive. I am sad that there is no placement in my college.

content.Placements: Anyone can admit if they have 60 percent marks in their previous school. There are no placement opportunities at my college. Not many companies come to our college. No internship opportunities are provided by the college. Many courses like BA, BCA, etc., are offered in my college.
content.Infrastructure: There is no Wi-Fi facility in my college. The computer lab in my college is very good. There are 2 smart rooms where teachers take classes. The hostel of our college is quite good for 2 people. The hostel fees are also low, but the canteen or mess is not provided by the college. The students in the hostel have to cook their own food. There are no medical facilities in our college. In case of an emergency, medical help is called from outside. Sports are held in December.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: The college is good for students.

content.Placements: Placement chances are good, and the placement percentage is 90 percent. Many companies visit the college for placements. In my course, placements are a bit low because many students prefer to do an MBA after BBA for better placement. The college tries its best for placements of students who are interested.
content.Infrastructure: My college provides the best facilities and infrastructure. It has AC labs with all working computers. The library has all kinds of books and PYQs, which are very important for students. Wi-Fi is also available. In the hostel, facilities are good.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2025

MGKVP Varanasi offers entrance-based admission to candidates in UG and PG courses. The college allots seats based on the last qualifying exam score in diploma courses. Step 1: MGKVP Application Process 2026

Admission at MGKVP, the initial step is to fill application form for CUET by visiting website ofNTAand submitting the application form after paying the application fee. Further, for admission to diploma courses, candidates are required to fill out the application form by visiting the official website of the university.
Step 2: MGKVP Selection Criteria 2026

Candidates based on valid scores in CUET will be shortlisted for the counselling process at MGKVP and further admission rounds based on the programmes the candidate applied for. Additionaly, to be eligible for admission to diploma courses, candidates are required to fill out the eligibility criteria set by the college.
Step 3: MGKVP Final Seat Allotment 2026

Candidates whose names appeared in the list of selected candidates in any particular programme will be required to report to the admission cell of MGKVP for document verification and fee payment for locking their seats for that specific course.

MGKVP offers MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery course at the UG level. MGKVP MBBS admissions are based on NEET UG scores followed by the NEET UG Counselling. For NEET cutoff 2022, the closing rank for MBBS stood at 303611 for the General Home State Quota. NEET UG Counselling is conducted by the MCC for final admission to MBBS/ BDS courses based on the NEET scores. Tabulated below are the closing ranks for MGKVP cutoff 2022:
Tabulated below are the important dates for MGKVP Varanasi CUET PG cutoff 2024:

MGKVP used to offer MBA course at the PG level based on CUET scores. As per MGKVP cut off 2023, the closing scores for Discontinued (Mar 2023) Master of Business Administration (MBA) stood at 161 for the General category, 112 for OBC category, 52 for SC category and 131 for EWS. All the aforementioned scores are for the All India Quota seats. Tabulated below is MGKVP cut off 2023 for the discontinued MBA course:
Tabulated below are the important dates for MGKVP CUET PG cutoff:

Based on AYUSH ranks, MGKVP Varanasi offers admission to the Ayurvedacharya in Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery course. As per AYUSH cutoff 2022, the closing rank after three rounds of counselling for Ayurvedacharya in Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery stood at, 25847 for the General category candidates belonging to All India Quota. For OBC All India, the closing rank was 29278 while for SC All India it was 134490. Candidates seeking admission can refer to the table given below to check out the previ

reviews.review_heading: My college teachers are good and supportive. I am sad that there is no placement in my college.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi facility in my college. The computer lab in my college is very good. There are 2 smart rooms where teachers take classes. The hostel of our college is quite good for 2 people. The hostel fees are also low, but the canteen or mess is not provided by the college. The students in the hostel have to cook their own food. There are no medical facilities in our college. In case of an emergency, medical help is called from outside. Sports are held in December.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by SMS - School of Management Sciences, VaranasiReviewed on 13 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The college is good for students.
reviews.review_text: My college provides the best facilities and infrastructure. It has AC labs with all working computers. The library has all kinds of books and PYQs, which are very important for students. Wi-Fi is also available. In the hostel, facilities are good.

reviews.review_heading: I am not absolutely dissatisfied. It's like 50-50.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are not good as shown in the image, and the library is also not good, and the gym is not good, and the video of the gym is also viral for not working equipment, and the Wi-Fi really works, and it is very low speed, mess, and the canteen food is like every canteen food.

reviews.review_heading: Life of a student at Mahatma Gandhi Kashi Vidyapith, Varanasi.
reviews.review_text: Facility and infrastructure of my university are awesome because you can do anything in the lab without restriction. Faculty members are so helpful and friendly. Library is medium means size of department but books are so huge. I do not live in hostel but hostel life is the best. Some of my friends live in hostel. There is one big ground in university. You can play anything in this ground.

reviews.review_heading: Best college in Varanasi.
reviews.review_text: The university has large classrooms, some of which are air-conditioned and well maintained. All types of facilities are available. Hostels are best with facilities of mess, canteen, medical, sports, and games. It has the best playground for playing sports.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Microtek College of Management & TechnologyReviewed on 31 Oct 2025)
reviews.review_heading: I want to improve the way they provide practical knowledge in greatly way.
reviews.review_text: 60 percent of the students were placed in the course. In my college, packages were above average. Highest salary totally depends on the students. If the performance of students good, they get the highest package. Top recruiting companies were Amazon, etc. Students got internships. Placement and training activities were held on regular basis.

reviews.review_heading: I am very satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very beautiful and very eco-friendly. Each classroom has too many fans there is no crowd feeling in the class because it is very big hall. Wi-Fi is also available on the campus. Canteens are good, but the taste of the canteen food is average.

reviews.review_heading: The campus is good. Infrastructure is best for some faculty members.
reviews.review_text: There is a Wi-Fi campus and separate hostels for boys and girls, and there is also a park, sports ground, and stadium for indoor games like badminton. There is also a gym, but the gym isn't that good and isn't working properly. There is a library and a study place where you can study and get books for free.

reviews.review_heading: MGKVP Varanasi review by Ishu.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of this college is good. Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms are also good. The library is very great. Hostel facility is good, mess and canteen are also great. This college is amazing overall. Infrastructure of this college is very great, and it is surrounded by nature.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by SMS - School of Management Sciences, VaranasiReviewed on 2 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: My college should focus on sports, and the canteen should have more variety!
reviews.review_text: There is a good infrastructure at my college, especially from the outside. I think they should improve more UG buildings, but PG buildings are amazing, like a university. The garden area is amazing, and the library is amazing, but the conference hall should be bigger because it is too small!

reviews.review_heading: Review of MGKVP - Mahatma Gandhi Kashi Vidyapith.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college is amazing. I came here and then I was very impressed because this college has Wi-Fi, the lapse, the class, everything is so great. I am a day scholar, so I don't know about the hotel facility, but the canteen and medical facilities are great, sports and games are also good.

reviews.review_heading: The greatest college of Varanasi.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of my college is amazing. The case, the department, and all the things are amazing. Wi-Fi, labs, classroom, and library, everything is great. Canteens are great, very hygienic, and have good medical facilities. Sports and games are also good.

reviews.review_heading: Good college, must take admission.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is great. Good for studies. Wi-Fi, classrooms, labs, and library are amazing. I did not opt for a hostel, so I don't know about it. Canteens are amazing, and hygienic sports and games are great. I love this college.

reviews.review_heading: College is so good compared to others.
reviews.review_text: All rooms are Wi-Fi enabled. Labs are clean. Classrooms are highly equipped. I suggest that the upcoming students who are willing to graduate from a well-known university should consider Mahatma Gandhi Kashi Vidyapeeth University for their faculty and reputation.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and got A grade by NAAC.
reviews.review_text: In the field of infrastructure, my college is very well in every field whether it is desks, blackboards, smart boards, water facilities, etc. Labs in our college are also well-maintained and have good guidance for the new students. Overall, good in everything.

paragraphs: MGKVP Varanasi offers a three-year BBA at the UG level. The programme is also offered at various MGKVP-affiliated institutes. The fee structure at these institutes vary from one another. MGKVP Varanasi BBA tuition fee across various affiliated institutes ranges between INR 1.2 Lacs and INR 2.4 lakh. As per the latest admission brochure, the BBA fee at the MGKVP is INR 22,000 per annum. The mentioned fee is sourced from the official website of the university/sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative.

The total fee for LLB at MGKVP Varanasi is INR 9,570. This fee, however, is been sources from unofficial websites on the internet. Hence, it can be considered indicative. For the exact fee for LLB, students are advised to visit the official website, check out the admission brochure or visit the admission office of MGKVP in-person. The application fee for LLB is as follows:

DISCLAIMER: The application fee mentioned in the above table is for UG courses since there is no information on the LLB application in the 2022-23 admission brochure. Refer to the official brochure available in the above table for more details.

One of the additional components that the students are required to pay other than the tuition fee while taking admission is the college application fee which is different for different category students. The same for M.Ed ranges between INR 950 - INR 1,050 across different categories. This fee must be paid while filling out the online application form before submission. Those candidates who wish to apply for two or more courses are given a 50% discount on every additional application filled after the first course onward. In addition to filling out the online application, students also have the option to submit the application fee and then download the application form. The same can then be filled and submitted offline.

The total fee for MEd at MGKVP Varanasi is INR 6,380. This fee, however, is been sourced from unofficial websites on the internet. Hence, it can be considered indicative. For the exact fee for MEd, students are advised to visit the official website, check out the admission brochure or visit the admission office of MGKVP in person. In addition to the tuition fee, one of the additional components that the students are required to pay is  the college application fee which is different for different category students. The same for M.Ed ranges between INR 950 - INR 1,050 across different categories. This fee must be paid while filling out the online application form before submission.

individual_reviews.title: Vedanta Medical College: Quite a good college and has improved a lot in these years.

content.Placements: We don't get placement in the college as it is a medical college. But we do get internships in this college after the completion of our course, which is 4.5 years. In this internship, we are provided with a good amount of stipend, and we get to learn all the medical skills.

reviews.review_heading: Vedanta Medical College: Quite a good college and has improved a lot in these years.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is quite good. We are provided with the best library with ACs installed, where we can go and study from morning till 1 a.m. at night. reviews.review_heading: Actually I am satisfied with my college.
reviews.review_text: The labs and practical rooms are so good. Also, they feel like to live made here. The messy food is also so. Good and best and healthy as well. The canteen in our campus and hostel campus both are so good and tasty food available. Our college has good Wi-Fi access for all.

reviews.review_heading: Review of my medical College.
reviews.review_text:
Twin sharing basis hostel with Wi-Fi equipped though it does not works most of the Times. Library with an outside reading room facility. Though not sufficient for every student
Mess is okay types. No any cafes or restaurants near by. Just a small tapri.

reviews.review_heading: It has a good infrastructure, campus, and is the best place to study medicine.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with its faculty members.

reviews.review_heading: College is a happy place. I spend time in activities and academics which makes my time in college.

There are 2 types of mess with a cafe. Hostel is there on the campus which makes college life memorable, interesting, and happy.

reviews_list.review_title: Review of Ruxmaniben Deepchand Gardi Medical College.

review_content.Placements: Our college does not provide placements. If you do PG, you will get jobs easily.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is average. There is no Wi-Fi in our college. Many classrooms are well-maintained, but some don't have good tables and chairs. Projectors are not good in condition. The library of our college is good. Its timings are from 8 am - 8 pm. Our college has practical labs with proper instruments. Some microscopes are not working well in some labs. The girls' hostel is well-maintained and has good facilities. The hostel fee is Rs. 1,000 per month. Some washrooms are not good. There is no good drinking water facility in the hostel. The boys' hostel is not good in condition. The mess is average. Its fee is around Rs. 3,000-4,000 per month. Our canteen does not provide many dishes. Our college provides free medical services. Sports are good.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Ruxmaniben Deepchand Gardi Medical College.

review_content.Placements: Our college has no placements. After completing their course, MBBS students are encouraged to seek employment in a government hospital or prepare for the PG entrance exam. The salary package offered is 15 LPA to 25 LPA. The highest salary package offered is 35 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: RDGMC is the oldest and first established semi-private medical college in Madhya Pradesh. The infrastructure and campus are quite old, but the resources are quite adequate. A three-storied air-conditioned library is available at the college. Classrooms are huge and spacious. The quality of hostels and canteens is not good. Students prefer to live in guest houses rather than hostels. The quality of the food is not good.

review_summary.college_name: Ruxmaniben Deepchand Gardi Medical College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: The college is everything you want.

content.Placements: Approximately 700-800 students are doing this course, a 60-70k package. They teach about the doctors' occupation, how to treat patients with their concerns, learn about multiple diseases which is harmful for our community, learning about ethics and manners that every doctor must have.
content.Infrastructure: There is a library in my college and it is very good for studying. There are different labs in different departments where we can perform many practicals and learn their advantages. Hostel facilities are good, food in the mess is also good and tasty. There occurs an annual event in which we can play games and enjoy ourselves.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: My college is good enough to become a doctor.

content.Placements: I'm pursuing MBBS from RD Gardi Medical College, Ujjain. I got admission in 2023 based on my NEET score. As part of the course, we have to do a one-year internship at the college's hospital, and those who have signed bonds are required to do rural service for one or two years.
content.Infrastructure: The college has good infrastructure, with proper labs for practicals and good medical facilities. Each department teaches students well. The quality of the hostel is good, and a variety of food is prepared every day.
content.Faculty: The professors are well-qualified and trained in their subjects. We have two sessionals, one pre-university exam, and one university exam. The passing percentage for each year is 50% in each subject to be promoted to the next year.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Review of Ruxmaniben Deepchand Gardi Medical College.

content.Placements: Our college does not provide placements. If you do PG, you will get jobs easily.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is average. There is no Wi-Fi in our college. Many classrooms are well-maintained, but some don't have good tables and chairs. Projectors are not good in condition. The library of our college is good. Its timings are from 8 am - 8 pm. Our college has practical labs with proper instruments. Some microscopes are not working well in some labs. The girls' hostel is well-maintained and has good facilities. The hostel fee is Rs. 1,000 per month. Some washrooms are not good. There is no good drinking water facility in the hostel. The boys' hostel is not good in condition. The mess is average. Its fee is around Rs. 3,000-4,000 per month. Our canteen does not provide many dishes. Our college provides free medical services. Sports are good.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Review of Ruxmaniben Deepchand Gardi Medical College.

content.Placements: Our college has no placements. After completing their course, MBBS students are encouraged to seek employment in a government hospital or prepare for the PG entrance exam. The salary package offered is 15 LPA to 25 LPA. The highest salary package offered is 35 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: RDGMC is the oldest and first established semi-private medical college in Madhya Pradesh. The infrastructure and campus are quite old, but the resources are quite adequate. A three-storied air-conditioned library is available at the college. Classrooms are huge and spacious. The quality of hostels and canteens is not good. Students prefer to live in guest houses rather than hostels. The quality of the food is not good.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Our college is good academically but the infrastructure is average.

content.Placements: Most of the students are doing post-graduation from good institutions. Others are working as doctors in various settings. There is a provision for a compulsory rotatory internship which is of one-year duration but without a stipend. Interns have less enthusiasm for doing the internship since there is no stipend.
content.Infrastructure: Lecture theatres are good but it has no air-conditioning. Wi-Fi is not available on campus. Hostels are in miserable conditions below the living standards of medical students. There is no switchboard provided. Food available in the mess is good. Library is good but has no air conditioning which makes this very difficult to study in summer time.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Ruxmaniben Deepchand Gardi Medical College.
reviews.review_text: RDGMC is the oldest and first established semi-private medical college in Madhya Pradesh. The infrastructure and campus are quite old, but the resources are quite adequate. A three-storied air-conditioned library is available at the college. Classrooms are huge and spacious. The quality of hostels and canteens is not good. Students prefer to live in guest houses rather than hostels. The quality of the food is not good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good academically but the infrastructure is average.
reviews.review_text: Lecture theatres are good but it has no air-conditioning. Wi-Fi is not available on campus. Hostels are in miserable conditions below the living standards of medical students. There is no switchboard provided. Food available in the mess is good. Library is good but has no air conditioning which makes this very difficult to study in summer time.

reviews.review_heading: My overall experience in the college was very good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good from the outside. The campus is enormous. However, the hostels are a bit on the lower side. They do need a lot of improvement. The mess and canteens are really good. Hospital and labs are good. The library is huge and spacious with lots of books.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good academics and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: We have labs, classrooms, badminton, playground, cricket playground, boys hostel, girls hostel, and a canteen. Girls hostel is fine. The fee charges are Rs. 12,000 per year. It is perfect but I heard that boys' hostel is not in good condition. There is no Wi-Fi. The overall infrastructure of our college is good. There is greenery all around.

reviews.review_heading: It is value for money and perfect college for people who want to gain good clinical knowledge.
reviews.review_text: There is one building for medical college. There are a total of 4 lecture halls and an auditorium. It is a 4-floor building, and the examination hall is on the top floor. The anatomy department is very well furnished. But there is no Wi-Fi connection for students, only for teachers. There is a very bad network coverage area. The library is good. It is of 3 floors, but 3rd is not in use because the students are less.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has value for money and has a good infrastructure and a lot of patient exposure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good here. There is one college building, which is sprawled over 5 floors. There are 5-6 lecture theatres, a canteen and a library nearby. There is no Wi-Fi facility. However, the hostel is situated in the nearby vicinity. There is an attached hospital named CRGH hospital, which gives maximum treatment facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good faculty members with great clinical exposure.
reviews.review_text: Quality of the food served is average. But washrooms are not at a proper condition. The library is good. Wi-Fi connection is not available here. The hostel facility is good. In each room, there are 2 students, and it may be senior-junior or maybe batchmates. A mess is in good condition. Food served to the students is hygienic. There is a study room in the hostel, and also for late-night studying.

reviews.review_heading: Teaching and other facilities are quite good here.
reviews.review_text: Labs are good, and it provides sufficient equipment to all students. The infrastructure of our college is clean, and it is filled with varieties of plants. Our college is well-maintained. Quality of food served in the hostel is good. Our college provides us with space to play sports on campus.

Courses offered by Martin Luther Christian University are in the fee range of INR 3,250-436,100 for candidates. The tuition fees for the courses range from INR 3,250-436,100 for all students.

Martin Luther Christian University was founded in 2005. It is a private university and is located in Shillong, Meghalaya. Martin Luther Christian University courses are offered to students at the UG, PG and Certificate levels. The institute offers courses in Full Time mode. Martin Luther Christian University offers a total of 54 courses in streams such as Medicine & Health Sciences, Business & Management Studies, IT & Software, Accounting & Commerce, Arts ( Fine / Visual / Performing ) and Humanities & Social Sciences. Some of the popular courses offered at the institute are MBA/PGDM, B.Sc., M.Sc., MCA and BCA. These courses are offered to students across several specialisations such as Counseling, English, Entrepreneurship, Environmental Geography and Environmental Sciences. Further, the fee for all these courses ranges between INR 3,250 to 4,36,100. Apart from this, the Martin Luther Christian University campus has a state-of-the-art infrastructure with all the advanced facilities.

Q. Which courses does Martin Luther Christian University offer?

reviews_list.review_title: The thing I like about Martin Luther Christian University (MLCU) is the relationship.

review_content.Placements: I got to know that the university scheduled placements mainly on Saturdays. Corporates, NGOs, government setups, and private firms came here for hiring students.
review_content.Infrastructure: I rented a PG, it is run by a local owner at Labalang, Shillong, and I paid Rs. 6,350 per month. There were no admission fees. The relation with students was maintained without much pressure from the owner/warden. The owner provided a bed, table and chair. The food menu was not up to our expectations. The standard of the menu was discouraging. Hostel fee was Rs. 72,600 per year.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: My experience in this college .

review_content.Placements: Good internship opportunities are provided to students; contacts of different companies are arranged, and internships in different companies are provided to students with good stipends. The job placement is very good and genuine. Companies like ICICI Bank, HDFC Bank, Axis Bank, TCS, and JP Morgan came here. Packages are attractive, like 3.5 LPA for entry-level roles. The placement is good in terms of good management and correlation between the company and students. The highest package offered is 12 LPA, and the average is 3 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: The course curriculum was exhaustive and was adapted to the requirements of the industry. There was a good balance between theory and project-based assessment, which helped students. I was a day scholar, so As a day scholar, I can't speak about the hostel facilities, but the on-campus hostel meant residents had an advantage for timely lecture attendance. The food was decent, and Sundays were typically fest days. I often spent time with friends who were hostel residents.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: The food was very awesome.

review_content.Placements: After the fourth trimester, you are eligible to sit in placement; after the 3rd trimester, you have to undergo a summary internship program. The companies that visited our college include Deloitte, Flipkart, Amazon, etc. The highest average package is 6 Lacs, and 100% placement is from the college only.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is no university-attached hostel. Although multiple hostels and PGs are available in and around the campus, the available hostel accommodation is well-known for its high-quality lodging and easy access to the campus. Hostel Fee: INR 70,000 per year.

reviews_list.review_title: College helps in being a good communicator, presenter, critical thinking ability, researcher, etc.

review_content.Placements: Around 52% of the students got placed in our course. The most recruiting organisation for our course was NGO. Almost 100% of students in our university got internships from college. Students get placed in different organisations both non-government and government organisations. Communicator, motivator, facilitator, educator, research, and presenter are roles offered.
review_content.Infrastructure: A good Wi-Fi connection is provided, and we have huge classrooms which include monitors, whiteboards, and different chart works that include the ethics and values of the university. The canteen is of good quality. There are different sports and games included where students can take part according to their comfort.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Psychology - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Martin Luther Christian University.

review_content.Placements: Almost 100% of the students from our course got placed. In our course, the highest salary package offered was 4 LPA, the lowest salary package offered was 2 LPA and the average salary package offered was 3 LPA. The top recruiting company of our college is Filter Wills. Almost 100% of the students got an internship.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are two buildings, and one is for psychology and tourism. The psychology department has 2 big classrooms and a laboratory along with one staff room. Classrooms and labs are average, but benches are not enough as compared to students. Boards are not placed properly.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: The best college from my experience.

review_content.Placements: Students look for online internships and industry training to gain more exposure and experience. Most of the students from our course got placed. In our course, the highest salary package offered was 4 LPA. The lowest salary package offered was 2 LPA. The average salary package offered was 3 LPA. I got to know that the university schedules placement mainly on Saturdays. Corporates, NGOs, government set-ups, private firms, etc., come here to hire students.
review_content.Infrastructure: The course curriculum was good. It covers the basics of management, and also it gives in-depth knowledge of management accompanied by experiential learning. It was designed in such a way that it offered a platform to acquire both hard and soft skills. At an affordable cost of 68,400 per year, a girl student could avail the hostel facility, and a boy could avail boys hostel facility at Rs 60,000 per year. Students preferred the college hostel facility over any other accommodation options.

highlights.summary: What's new at Bhupal Nobles (BN) University? Admission is open to all courses. Interested candidates can apply by visiting the official college website.

faqs.answer: A:    The highest package offered at Bhupal Nobles University is INR 20 lacs per annum, while the average/lowest salary offered was INR 1.5 Lakh Per Annum (CTC). The university has a strong placement cell that helps students secure internships and job opportunities. In the year 2023, students of Bhupal Nobles University got direct campus placements in top companies like Tech Mahindra, Vodafone, HCL Technologies, Wipro, and others.
faqs.question: What was the highest package offered at Bhupal Nobles University?

faqs.answer: A:    The university has a good record of placements in reputed companies and organisations. Some of the top recruiters that offer placements to the students are Tech Mahindra, Vodafone, HCL Technologies, Concentrix Mumbai, Hindustan Zinc, Udaipur, HRH Group Udaipur, Dainik Bhaskar, Karvi Stock Broking, Comfort Tours and Travels, ICICI Bank and especially Tata Consultancy Services etc. The students get placed in various sectors such as IT, banking, finance, education, pharmaceuticals, law, and s

faqs.answer: A:    The overall cost of Bhupal Nobles' University BSc is around INR 51,000 - INR 2.8 lakh. The BSc fee also includes multiple fee components that must be paid at the time of admission as a one-time payment.  Additionally, the Enrollment Fee for new students is INR 1,000 (one-time only). For finalising BSc admission candidates must pay the BSc course fee before the due date and get the receipt from the office. Students are required to present the fee receipt to the subject teacher/s to get their names enlisted in the respective class Attendance Register of the Subject Teacher.

For finalising BSc admission candidates must pay the BSc course fee before the due date and get the receipt from the office. reviews_list.review_title: Our college has good infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: Almost 85 percent of students got placed in our college. The highest salary package offered ranges between 20 LPA - 25 LPA. The average salary package offered ranges between 5 LPA - 7 LPA. The lowest salary package offered ranges between 4 LPA - 5 LPA. Almost 50 percent of students got internships in national companies. Top recruiting companies are TCS etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college offers a range of facilities in both gaming and agriculture. It has good infrastructure WiFi access and several labs while the classrooms and library are of average quality. The hostel accommodations are pleasant and the food served is also good. The canteen provides a variety of tasty options. This college offers more sports and games compared to other colleges in Udaipur and the medical facilities are satisfactory.

reviews_list.batch_info: Doctor of Pharmacy (Pharm.D.) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: In the end, the college was good and you will find some good friends here.

review_content.Placements: In my course, many students get their placements through college. This course has a wide range of opportunities in foreign countries. Most of the students did their internships at Ananta Hospital Medical Institute and other hospitals.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel that is located is not so good. The washrooms are very dirty and have very less facilities. The food is also not so good. The college library is good. Classrooms are well-arranged. There are a variety of sports facilities in this college.

You may the manager or executive in term of designation.The management term is most suited to the managers and that's why it is the way, where you can reach on the top of the height as soon as possible by using your leadership and working proficiency. An MBA professional always plays a vital role in his/her company and this is why he used to keep in touch with the board of directors. fees_overview.description: Candidates can enroll for any of the BN University courses by paying the course fee. The fee for the available courses ranges from INR 12,000 - 2,80,000. The BN University fee is made up of a number of different elements, including the tuition, security deposit, and hostel fee. There are two types of BN University fee components: refundable and non-refundable. To confirm their seat, candidates who made through the shortlist via the BN University admission process must pay the course fee.

admission_overview.college_name: Bhupal Nobles University Admission 2025: Fees, Eligibility, Selection Process & Dates

paragraphs: Bhupal Nobles University offers UG, PG, Diploma and research programmes in the stream of Humanities & Social Science, Teaching & Education, Law, Medicine & Health Sciences, Arts, Accounting & Commerce, and Pharmacy. The University has multiple departments which are known as faculties offering 76 courses across 13 streams. BNU has over 30 experienced and highly qualified faculty members on its campus.

For Bhupal Nobles University admissions to various UG & PG courses, candidates have to fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria, followed by the other selection rounds. Find below the course-wise eligibility and selection criteria related to Bhupal Nobles University course admissions 2025:

Bhupal Nobles University admissions 2025 are both merit and entrance-based. Candidates have to qualify for all the rounds of the selection process. Find below the detailed process for Bhupal Nobles University admissions 2025:
Step 1: Bhupal Nobles University Application Process 2025

Bhupal Nobles University admission process 2025 starts with the application process. Candidates can download the application process from the university's official website. The duly filled application form has to be sent either through post or submitted in person at the concerned department at Bhupal Nobles University. However, the application and entrance test fee will be paid online and candidates have to attach the pay slip along with the two copies of the online bank challan with the application form.
Step 2: Selection Rounds

Admission to all the PG courses at Bhupal Nobles University is entrance-based. Candidates have to qualify for either university-level or state-level entrance exams such as JEE Main for the selection of respective courses. Furthermore, the university offers UG courses through its affiliated colleges. Admissions to UG courses are based on merit scores obtained in the last qualifying exam.
Step 3: Merit List Release & Counselling

After the completion of all the selection rounds, candidates have to appear for the counselling process for the respective courses. Later on, the university will release the merit list in various rounds of the selected candidates. Students who find their names on the merit list need to pay a certain amount of fee to secure their seats.

overview_faqs.question: What are the fees structures for MBA programmes at Lingaya's Vidyapeeth?
overview_faqs.answer: Lingaya's Vidyapeeth is a private deemed-to-be university located in Faridabad. The total tuition fee for an MBA in Finance is INR 1.92 lakh. Lingayas Institute of Management and Technology MBA in Human Resource fee structure is INR 1.92 lakh and the accommodation is around 50,000 finally for one year they will charge around 1.5 lakhs based on campus location there are slight changes in the amount.

review_summary.college_name: Lingaya’s Vidyapeeth Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The best colleges in NCR. If you want the best infrastructure, this college is very good for you.

content.Placements: Lingayas Vidyapeeth is a top-ranked college. Their placement cell and placement structure are very good. They give assurance to their students about placement. They provide 100% placement to their students from medium to top companies with a high package of 50 LPA, and the lowest is 3 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of the college is very nice, like a dream college. They have aesthetic views and provide nice facilities to their students. They have an AC classroom, nice branches, brand corners for the cafeteria. Along with an advanced library, and a big auditorium for students.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: College is very good, the campus is quite big, and the faculty are supportive.

content.Placements: I am a student of B Pharmacy 4th year, and placement rate of students is about 60%- 65% and minimun package is 1.5 LPA. The companies are Monique, Mankind and so on. I have learned many things, like GMP, GLP, and many more. Good laboratory practice.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel is quite big, good and clean, and cold water is available, and rooms have wardrobes and beds of good quality. Also, the electricity is available all the time. Warden is also very supportive.
content.Faculty: Teacher are very good and qualified, and the minimum qualification of teacher is about Ph.D. and a Master's. The curriculum is very good and they make a well-qualified student, which is ready to move into the industry. I have done my internship from Monique pharmaceutical, which is sponsored by college. Faculty members are very supportive, and they help with studies, and they are highly qualified.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Very satisfied, it gives us good placement, infrastructure, and the faculty is good.

content.Placements: I am from B.Pharma passing year 2026 batch. Around 70 to 75% students are placed with an average package of around 3 to 3.5 LPA. Recruiters like Brown Laboratories, Monique Pharmaceuticals, and similar industries come for placement in the college. The students are good and have a friendly nature.
content.Infrastructure: Everything is good, whether it is infrastructure, classroom, hostel room, Wi-Fi, or lab everything is good, the quality of hostel rooms is very good, they are spacious and always clean. Food is good, medical facilities are good, and all sports games are played both in the college campus and outside the campus for competitions..

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Our college provides all types of support to the students.

content.Placements: 30% of students are placed in the college course, with the highest package offered being 6 LPA and the lowest package 2 LPA. Additionally, 40% of students got internships from the college in companies like Mankind, Brown Laboratories, etc., in Research and Development (R&D).
content.Infrastructure: We do have a lab with proper managing staff and a lab attendant. We do have smart boards in our classes and a separate departmental library in our pharmacy department. The hostels are in very good condition, and the wardens of both hostels are very supportive and treat all the students as their own children.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Our college Infrastructure and water facilities are good.

content.Placements: 70% of students are placed, the highest package is 4.2 LPA, and the lowest package is 2.40 LPA. Top recruiting companies included Brawn Laboratories, Unimax, Monique, Sarvodaya Hospital, Amrita Hospital, and Apollo Hospital. Brawn Laboratories recruited 30%, Unimax 20%, Monique 20%, and others 30%. Students joined as pharmacists.
content.Infrastructure: Labs are well-equipped, neat, and have good facilities. Infrastructure is also good, clean, and full of ventilation with A.C., fans, and windows. A digital library is also available for some books. Wi-Fi is available in each department and hostel for students and teachers.

admission_overview.title: Lingaya's Vidyapeeth Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: Lingaya’s Vidyapeeth is currently open. The college offers various courses at the UG and PG level. Apart from the UG and PG courses, the university also offers PhD courses. Students are selected based on merit and entrance exam scores. To be admitted to Lingaya’s Vidyapeeth, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the university. The application process is conducted online.

In order to be eligible for MBA courses, students must have obtained a UG degree with a minimum of 50% in aggregate. Moreover, the seats are allocated based on accepted exam scores. faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for MBA at Lingaya Vidyapeeth?

paragraphs: Lingaya’s Vidyapeeth admissionsare based on merit and entrance exam scores. The admission process at Lingaya’s Vidyapeeth is as follows:
STEP 1: Lingaya’s Vidyapeeth Registration & Application Process

The mode of application is online. Aspirants need to apply at the official website of Lingaya’s Vidyapeeth (www.lingayasvidyapeeth.edu.in). Candidates should meet the eligibility criteria set by the university.
STEP 2: Shortlisting by the Admission Committee
Candidates are selected based on merit and university-level entrance exam scores.
STEP 3: Selection Process
Shortlisted candidates must appear for GD-PI + WAT.
STEP 4: Admission Confirmation
Selected candidates are further called for document verification. Post document verification, students must pay the fee to confirm the admission.

placement_report.college_name: Lingaya’s Vidyapeeth Placements 2025: Highest Package, Average Package, Top Companies

placement_data.title: Lingaya’s Vidyapeeth Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: Lingaya’s Vidyapeeth has a placement cell that offers placement assistance to all of its students. Resume writing workshops, GD sessions, mock interviews, and other skill-building workshops are organized to train and enlighten students in numerous domains and also to develop their soft skills.

Recently, the institute has concluded the placements for the batch that passed out in 2025. As per the latest report, the highest package offered during Lingaya’s Vidyapeeth placements 2025 stood at INR 15 LPA . A total of 1100 students participated in the placement session 2025, of which 650 students were placed in reputed companies. The top recruiters of Lingaya’s Vidyapeeth in 2025 included Accenture, WNS, HCL , Wipro, Genpact, Infosys, Meesho , Adani, Capgemini, Jaro Education, Square Yards , Accenture, Protiviti, Cvent, Sarvodhya Hospital, Escorts Kubota , etc

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college because of good faculty, placement, and really good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Lingaya’s Vidyapeeth is a very good college, and the facilities and infrastructure of the college are very good. The college contains various departments like Pharmacy, Law, Nursing, etc. The classes are also very good, the labs are smart, and the library is very good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is very time-restricted, students are not allowed to go outside the college before 3 pm.
