A digital library is also available but only for some books. Wi-Fi is available in the hostel for students. Games and sports encourage students towards competition.

reviews.review_heading: I am happy to have gotten admission in Lingaya’s Vidyapeeth.
reviews.review_text: Our B.Pharma department has fully equipped labs, smart classrooms, high-speed Wi-Fi, and a rich library, hostel facilities are clean, with good food in the mess and canteen. Medical support, sports, and games are well-maintained and easily accessible. I am very happy.

reviews.review_heading: Lingaya's Vidyapeeth review.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure for both the college and the hostel is living worthy. Cleaning is done according to the timetable regularly by the cleaning staff. A little development at some what part may be needed, but overall, the building, rooms, classes, and whole infrastructure are above average.

reviews.review_heading: College is great. The faculty are nice.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure and facilities are nice and good. Labs are always available for students. Labs are in good condition, and all the instruments, chemicals and glassware are available for students. Chemicals are of good quality and condition, and the instruments are of good quality.

reviews.review_heading: Good college for all the students.
reviews.review_text:
Wi-Fi is not available. State scholarship is not available in this college. 
Labs are good. Classroom is not very good. No AC in any classroom, 
if there is any, they will not be working. Teachers are very supportive and helpful, especially the sports teacher. The ground is very good. Academic activity is regularly done. Good senior behaviour.

reviews.review_heading: Best college in Faridabad.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure of the college and each department of education are the best at their level, as they are properly ventilated and built. The facilities in the hostel and mess are also nice, and the quality of food served in the canteen is also good.

reviews.review_heading: The best college I found for my higher studies.
reviews.review_text: The first thing I loved in my college was the infrastructure. The buildings and the green around the college are so good. Infrastructure is so amazing, I love my college, it was so good I can see my future bright. A blessed teacher, the best mentor to support.

reviews.review_heading: College is an okay environment, okay crowd. Here, it's not good, but the facility is nice.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not so good. There are no ACs in the classroom. The lab seating arrangement is not good. The class is so crowded that I wanted to change the seating arrangement, and also the classroom cleanliness. The seats are so comfortable, and kindly look into this problem, there is no Wi-Fi in the classroom or lab.

reviews.review_heading: It's good for only the pharmacy in Faridabad under a good budget, but not for other courses.
reviews.review_text: Very old buildings and bad flooring, ceiling and wall materials. Titles are getting broken at many places in college. Also, a few water coolers are working, others are in the worst condition. AC doesn't work either, only in the Offices of the facility. Don't get fooled by AC at exception.

likes.text: Top recruitment companies like Apple, Infosys, Huawei, Zomato, and many more companies visit the campus.
The students have to do hard work while training and clear the interviews for getting good and higher packages from the companies.

college_info.intro:
The flagship programmes offered at UPES Dehradun are BTech and MBA. The college offers these programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. Further, the college offers these programmes for a duration of 4 and 2 years, respectively, with a comprehensive curriculum. UPES Uttarakhand courses strive to enhance the learning experience of students to prepare them for the industry. Other popular courses include BSc, BDes, MDes, BA (Hons), BPharm, LLB, etc. Candidates can check the popular programmes offered at UPES Kandoli campus in the table provided below:
Check out the video below to know more about UPES programmes:
Candidates can check the popular programmes offered at UPES Uttrakhand in the table provided below:

student_insights.feedback: Students can work with faculty on research projects
Many students started their own start-ups
Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities
Very Active and resourceful, college is also involved

faqs.answer: A:    The top 10% BTech students from School of Computer Science received average package of 42 LPA in 2025. Earlier, the top 10% UPES Dehradun average package offered to the BTech CSE batch 2024 of the School of Computer Science stood at INR 17.69 LPA. faqs.question: What is the average placement of CSE in UPES?

faqs.answer: A:    M.Tech jobs at UPES School of Advanced Engineering have an extremely impressive placement rate of upto 96.55% for 2021-22. The highest CTC offered was 33 LPA and the average salary was 7.02 LPA. Some of the top recruiters include Airbus, Boeing, Deloitte USI, Ernst & Young, KPMG, PwC, LTI-Larsen & Toubro InfoTech Ltd, Wipro Limited, etc. They are not only providing good placements for M.Tech students but also proved it's records for good placements in all the courses in UPES
faqs.question: How are M.Tech placements at UPES School of Advanced Engineering?

faqs.answer: A:    Placements at UPES Dehradun are good. The highest and top 10% average package offered during School of Computer Science placement 2025 was 52 LPA and 42 LPA. The highest package in School of Business was 29 LPA.
faqs.question: What is the placement record of UPES Dehradun?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: UPES Dehradun offers various courses to students at the UG, PG, Diploma, Certificate, and Doctoral levels. Some popular courses that are offered are BSc, BTech, BBA, BPharm, etc. The duration of these courses ranges between 3 and 4 years. At the PG level, some popular programmes are MBA, MCA, MSc, MTech, MA, and MDes. UPES University Dehradun courses are offered in full-time and online mode. The college offers these programmes under several streams such as Engineering, Management, Science, Business, etc. UPES Dehradun fees structure include recurring and one-time chargeable components. Below are some of the courses offered by UPES Kandoli and their respective eligibility and fees:

faqs.answer: A:    UPES offers an MBA programme at the PG level. It is offered in full-time mode for 2 years. The total tuition fee of MBA at University of Petroleum in Dehradun ranges between INR 16.7 Lacs and INR 19.5 lakh.
faqs.question: What is the total tuition fee of MBA at UPES?

faqs.answer: A:    UPES MBA fee is between INR 1.5 lakh and INR 15.7 lakh as per an unofficial source. The fee is calculated based on tuition fee and does not includes other components. Students are required to pay course fee after completion of all selection rounds to confirm their seats. The selection to MBA course will be based on national and university level entrance exams like CAT, MAT, XAT, CMAT, UPESMET, etc., followed by group discussion and personal interview round. In case a candidate is unable to pay fee within the specified time, his or her admission will stand cancelled. Aspirants will also need to pay a registration fee to apply for admission. The application fee for MBA course is INR 1,350. They can pay the registration fee via any of online payment mode.
faqs.question: What is the fees of UPES MBA?

faqs.answer: A:    To get into the UPES School of Computer Science M.Tech program, you must have at least 60% marks in both your 10th and 12th grade. You must also have a minimum of 60% in your graduation. You can apply to UPES College based on your board merit. You must also take the annual UPSEAT exam to get admission.
faqs.question: Can I get into UPES School of Computer Science M.Tech with 70% in class 12th?

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. (Hons.) in Computer Science and Engineering (Cyber Security and Digital Forensics) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: The college can improve on the placement records.

review_content.Placements: A smaller number of student placement records have been shown this year, and I heard about the fact that Microsoft banned this college from entering for placements due to an internal issue. The placements average at 7 to 10LPA, that too if you are qualified with a good amount of knowledge in the field.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities are fair, sports facilities can be improved, and there are frequent Wi-Fi problems. I went inside the on campus hostel and noticed the rooms are smaller but ventilated well with a good mess. There needs to be more events based on communities outside the college.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. (Hons.) in Computer Science and Engineering (Cloud Computing and Virtualization Technology) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Career prospects are strong, though classrooms can feel average.

review_content.Placements: UPES has excellent placement opportunities, especially in CSE. Around 90-95% students are placed with the highest package going above 50 LPA, and the average is 8 LPA. Opportunities are there, but for top performers. Core roles are limited, and many companies offer mass recruitment profiles.
review_content.Infrastructure: UPES has one of the best infrastructures among private universities in India, but classrooms should have AC. Hostel and cafeteria are decent, the view from hostel is epic. Wi-Fi-enabled labs are advanced, well-stocked libraries. Sometimes you feel crowded in hostel.

course_faqs.question: What is the fees for M.Tech at UPES School of Advanced Engineering?
course_faqs.answer: Students must pay the fees within the stipulated time frame to secure their admission into the course. The fee can be paid online or offline through various modes of payment such as credit/debit card, net banking, or demand draft. The fees can cost about three to 6 lakhs. It also depends on the stream of majors chosen by the candidate. There are also additional fees. On the other hand, the college also provides various scholarships for the students.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fees for BBA in UPES University Dehradun?
overview_faqs.answer: Total tuition fee for BBA ranges between INR 1.5 Lacs and INR 14 Lacs as per unofficial source. The fee excludes other fee components like caution deposit, exam fee, etc. Aspirants are required to pay course fee after completion of all selection rounds to confirm their seats. Selection to BBA course will be based on national and university level entrance exams like UPESMET UG, UGAT or CUET UG followed by a personal interview round. For admission to Global BBA, candidates need to qualify PI round and submit Statement of Purpose. If a student is unable to pay fee within given time, his or her admission will be cancelled. Students also need to pay registration fee through online mode to apply for admission. The application fee for UPESMET UG is INR 1,350.

overview_faqs.question: How do I check the refund policy of UPES Dehradun?
overview_faqs.answer: UPES Dehradun offers has a fee refund policy. Students can go to its portal to check the same. To access the portal, candidates are required to visit the official website of university and click on fee refund policy. Here, candidates are required to enter the application number to get refund policy.

overview_faqs.question: What are the fee refund rules at UPES Dehradun?
overview_faqs.answer: In UPES Dehradun, fees once paid will be fully refunded, with a deduction of INR 1,000 for processing charges if a withdrawal request is made before the session starts. In case a withdrawal application is made after the commencement of classes, fees will be refunded after a deduction along with a deduction of INR 1000 towards processing charges. The fee shall be refunded within 90 days of the start of the academic session if the refund application is submitted before the start of the session.

overview_faqs.question: Is UPES Dehradun good for BTech Computer Science?
overview_faqs.answer: At the undergraduate level, UPES Dehradun offers four to five-year BE/B.Tech, three to four-year BBA B.Sc. B.Com B.A. And various other courses to students. Yes, UPES Dehradun is good for B.Tech Computer Science. The university is ranked 54 under the Engineering category by NIRF 2023. Engineering students are offered good placement opportunities by market leaders. Also, the university provides scholarships to Engineering and various other course students.

review_summary.college_name: UPES Dehradun Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Applied Petroleum Engineering (Intelligent Petroleum Systems) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely I am satisfied because of good culture, faculty, and good placement in 2025.

content.Placements: About 95 percent of students are placed in the year 2025, the highest package is about 35 LPA, the average is about 11 LPA, and the top recruiters for our branch are Cairn Oil & Gas, Vedanta Ltd, ONGC, Adani Gas, HP, Oil India Limited, GAIL, and many more.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure are good, we have a common library, the campus is divided into blocks in which classes are conducted, sports facilities are also good, the college hostel has a limited number of seats so I would prefer an off-campus hostel, but the food in the campus is good.

individual_reviews.course: MBA in Finance Management - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Knowledgeable faculty and support.

content.Placements: 99% are placed. 6 LPA is the lowest package, and 33 LPA is the highest, but placement records are good, and everyone is getting placements somewhere else, and students are also supportive. Zepto, blinkit, EY, KPMG ITC, Indigo, Aadani Airpot, ONGC and all are recruiting. 100% got internships. Manager and Consulting roles are offered. placements are also good.
content.Infrastructure: Everything has Wi-Fi, a good connection, good college life and a view. Hostel life is amazing and has to be seen, and the night view and jamming sessions are the point of attraction.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. (Hons.) in Computer Science and Engineering (Cyber Security and Digital Forensics) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The college can improve on the placement records.

content.Placements: A smaller number of student placement records have been shown this year, and I heard about the fact that Microsoft banned this college from entering for placements due to an internal issue. The placements average at 7 to 10LPA, that too if you are qualified with a good amount of knowledge in the field.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are fair, sports facilities can be improved, and there are frequent Wi-Fi problems. I went inside the on campus hostel and noticed the rooms are smaller but ventilated well with a good mess. There needs to be more events based on communities outside the college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. (Hons.) in Computer Science and Engineering (Cloud Computing and Virtualization Technology) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Career prospects are strong, though classrooms can feel average.

content.Placements: UPES has excellent placement opportunities, especially in CSE. Around 90-95% students are placed with the highest package going above 50 LPA, and the average is 8 LPA. Opportunities are there, but for top performers. Core roles are limited, and many companies offer mass recruitment profiles.
content.Infrastructure: UPES has one of the best infrastructures among private universities in India, but classrooms should have AC. Hostel and cafeteria are decent, the view from hostel is epic. Wi-Fi-enabled labs are advanced, well-stocked libraries. Sometimes you feel crowded in hostel.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Applied Petroleum Engineering (Energy Systems and Storage) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: So basically, if you are willing to have good placements and be successful.

content.Placements: So basically, in my course, the strength of the students is not that much, which means the competition criteria is not very high, resulting in good placements. I'm currently in batch 1, and the total batches in my passing stream are 3. The eligibility criteria to sit for placements is 8+ CGPA, which every student should have for their own benefit. The highest package in my college is recorded as 50 LPA, which is recently offered in 2024, whereas the average top package is 17 LPA, which I think is good for a beginner.
content.Infrastructure: So TBH, I am not living in the campus hostel as the campus hostel serves non-veg food, and I have been a vegan from birth. So I avoid living inside the college campus. But I have seen some facilities and also heard more from my friends, like good infrastructure with good-speed Wi-Fi, properly furnished rooms with no smelly gallery, separate balconies, and many more. Medical facilities and other curricular activities are also available on campus in different places with different rules.

admission_overview.title: UPES Dehradun Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: UPES Dehradun admission 2026 is both merit and entrance-based. The university provides more than twenty programmes at the UG, PG, and PhD levels. These are offered in fields, such as Engineering, Management, Science, Business, Design, Law, Computer Applications, Commerce, and Arts. The modes of study can be full-time or online, depending on the course. UPES Dehradun conducts its entrance exams, such as UPESMET UG, UPESEAT, etc., for admission to some specific courses including BTech, MBA, BBA, etc. The university also accepts JEE Main, CAT, CUET UG & PG, etc as an alternative. faqs.question: How to get seat in UPES Dehradun?
faqs.answer: Students can check below the steps to get a seat at UPES Dehradun:Log on to the official website.Complete your application form online.The selection criteria is entrance/merit-based.Upon selected, pay the specified fee to confirm and secure your seat.

faqs.question: Which entrance exam is conducted by UPES?
faqs.answer: UPES Dehradun conducts its own entrance exams, such as UPESMET, UPESMET UG, UPESPAT, etc. for providing admission to specific courses. See the table below to know more about the university-level exams conducted for popular UPES courses:Course NameIn-house ExamsMBAUPESMETBTech/ BTech (Hons)UPESEATBBAUPESMET UGBPharmaUPESPAT

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission in School of Health Sciences and Technology, UPES?
faqs.answer: To get admission in School of Health Sciences and Technology, UPES candidates might have to complete multi-step process. Check below the admission steps for UPES:Application:The mode of application is online. The application fee for BTech, BPharma, MSc, and BSc is  INR 1,350 each.Selection rounds:The university conducts its own entrance exams for providing admission to specific courses. Apart from these, UPES Dehradun also accepts national-level entrance exams like CUET UG, NEET, JEE Main, etc.Admission confirmation:After completion of the selection rounds, the shortlisted candidates are called for verification of the documents. Aspirants need to pay course fee to confirm their seat in the university.

faqs.question: Can I get into UPES School of Computer Science M.Tech with 70% in class 12th?
faqs.answer: To get into the UPES School of Computer Science M.Tech program, you must have at least 60% marks in both your 10th and 12th grade. You must also have a minimum of 60% in your graduation.You can apply to UPES College based on your board merit. You must also take the annual UPSEAT exam to get admission.

placement_data.title: UPES Dehradun Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: UPES Dehradun placement 2025 are ongoing. The UPES placement rate recorded in 2025 so far is 92%. The overall highest package offered in 2025 till date was INR 52 LPA . It was offered to BTech students from the School of Computer Science . The highest salary recorded in School of Advance Engineering and School of Business was 27.6 LPA and 29 LPA. Highest package of 11.7 LPA and 22.5 LPA was offered to students of School of Design and School of Law . Highest salary in the School of Health Sciences & Technology and School of Liberal Studies and Media was 6 LPA and 5 LPA.

faqs.question: How are the placement statistics of UPES Dehradun and what are its best fields?
faqs.answer: 2444 students were placed and 800 companies visited during UPES placement 2025. The highest package recorded was 52 LPA. Earlier in 2024, the highest package was 49 LPA. The placement rate in 2025 was above 90%.

faqs.question: How many students were placed during UPES Dehradun placements in the past few years?
faqs.answer: A total of 2444 students were placed in 2025. Earlier, 2482 students were placed durin the placement drive 2024. The placement rate recorded in 2025 and 2024 was 92% and 92.41%.

faqs.question: What are the school-wise highest package offered at UPES Dehradun?
faqs.answer: The school-wise highest package offered during UPES Dehradun placements 2025 is yet to be released. faqs.question: How are the placements at UPES School of Law?
faqs.answer: UPES School of Law offers decent placements annually to its BA LLB, LLB and LLM students. The highest salary secured by the students of the batch 2025 was INR 22.5 LPA. The average salary secured by the top 10% of the Law batch 2025 was INR 8.9 LPA. The name of the top recruiters include Eaton, Factum Legal, Pramata, HCL, Sterlite Power, etc.

faqs.question: How good is UPES Dehradun for MBA placements?
faqs.answer: MBA is one of the popular courses of UPES Dehradun. When it comes to placements, the University offers decent placements annually. The highest package offered during UPES MBA placements 2025 stood at INR 29 LPA. The top 10% UPES MBA average package offered during UPES placements 2025 stood was 15.8 LPA.

faqs.question: What is the average placement of CSE in UPES?
faqs.answer: The top 10% BTech students from School of Computer Science received average package of 42 LPA in 2025. Earlier, the top 10% UPES Dehradun average package offered to the BTech CSE batch 2024 of the School of Computer Science stood at INR 17.69 LPA. The key highlights of the School of Computer Science placements for the Class of 2024 are presented below: School Average Package (2024) Highest Package (2024) School of Computer Science INR 8.41 LPA (overall) INR 8.59 LPA (BTech CSE) INR 17.46 LPA (top 10% overall) INR 17.69 LPA (top 10% BTech CSE) INR 50.09 LPA (overall) INR 50.09 LPA (BTech CSE)

faqs.question: What is the average package offered during the recent UPES Dehradun placements?
faqs.answer: The 2025 overall average salary details have not been disclosed. UPES Dehradun average package in 2024 was INR 7.02 LPA. The top 10% UPES Dehradun average package offered to the BTech CSE batch 2024 of the School of Computer Science stood at INR 17.69 LPA. The average package varies school-wise. UPES School of Advanced Engineering overall average package was INR 7.02 LPA . While in the School of Business, the overall and MBA average package was INR 6.47 LPA and INR 7.69 LPA, respectively

faqs.question: How are M.Tech placements at UPES School of Advanced Engineering?
faqs.answer: M.Tech jobs at UPES School of Advanced Engineering have an extremely impressive placement rate of upto 96.55% for 2021-22. The highest CTC offered was 33 LPA and the average salary was 7.02 LPA. Some of the top recruiters include Airbus, Boeing, Deloitte USI, Ernst & Young, KPMG, PwC, LTI-Larsen & Toubro InfoTech Ltd, Wipro Limited, etc. They are not only providing good placements for M.Tech students but also proved it's records for good placements in all the courses in UPES

faqs.question: What is the fees of UPES MBA?
faqs.answer: UPES MBA fee is between INR 1.5 lakh and INR 15.7 lakh as per an unofficial source. The fee is calculated based on tuition fee and does not includes other components. Students are required to pay course fee after completion of all selection rounds to confirm their seats. The selection to MBA course will be based on national and university level entrance exams like CAT, MAT, XAT, CMAT, UPESMET, etc., followed by group discussion and personal interview round. In case a candidate is unable to pay fee within the specified time, his or her admission will stand cancelled. Aspirants will also need to pay a registration fee to apply for admission. The application fee for MBA course is INR 1,350. They can pay the registration fee via any of online payment mode.

faqs.answer: MBA is one of the popular courses of UPES Dehradun. When it comes to placements, the University offers decent placements annually. The highest package offered during UPES MBA placements 2025 stood at INR 29 LPA. The top 10% UPES MBA average package offered during UPES placements 2025 stood was 15.8 LPA.

faqs.question: Who are the top recruiters for MBA at UPES Dehradun?
faqs.answer: Some of the eminent companies that were part of the recent UPES Dehradun placements are mentioned in the table below: UPES Dehradun Top Recruiters Schlumberger Amazon Adobe Microsoft ONGC Deloitte KPMG EY PwC

faqs.question: What is the application fee for UPES Dehradun?
faqs.answer: Students seeking for UPES Dehradun engineering admissions have to register for UPESEAT. The application fee for the same is INR 1750. Students can pay the fee online through net banking/ UPI/ Credit Card/ Debit Card. Note: The fee is taken from offiical sources and can change.

description: UPES Dehradun cutoff 2025 for admission to the MBA programme is determined by candidates' performance in the national-level management entrance exams such as CAT, XAT, MAT, CMAT, and GMAT. In the meantime, students can refer to the sections below to view the UPES Dehradun cutoff 2024 for different exams, courses, and categories.

Students can refer to the table below to know the UPES Dehradun MBA cutoff based on the NMAT score and MAT percentile. Students can refer to the tables below for the cutoff date for the year 2024, and previous two years, i.e., 2023 and 2022 for various MBA specialisations.

As per UPES Dehradun cut off 2024 for MBA, the minimum NMAT cutoff score is 140. Also, taking into consideration XAT cutoff for MBA in Operations Management, candidates must have an overall percentile of 50 for General All India category students. In 2024, the cutoff for all MBA specialisations for the MAT exam is 70 for the General AI quota. On analysing the two years, we can say that there has been no change in the cutoff trends.

Students who want admission to UPES, Dehradun for its MBA course, should keep track of the important dates related to national-level entrance exams, like NMAT, XAT, etc. To help with the same, the table below contains the important dates for admission at UPES, Dehradun.
UPES Dehradun MBA cutoff 2025 will be released soon. In the meantime, candidates can check out the table below to view or download the year-wise cutoff list to check the MBA cutoff trends.

highlights.description:
UPES is one of India’s top institutes. Eminent national & international ranking bodies have acknowledged it as a leading institute. As per NIRF 2025, the ranking of the institute is #64 in the Overall category, #45 under University, #43 under Engineering, #36 under Management, and #18 under Law. Talking about the international rankings, the QS World Rankings 2025 has awarded rank #801-850 to UPES. The institute is ranked as one of the best institutes for its top class faculty. The article mentioned in this space covers all the details you need if you are interested in UPES rankings.
Read less

nirf.description:
As per the overall score, UPES has been placed at a good position by the NIRF under the 'Overall' category, reflecting its exceptional performance in areas like Teaching, Research, Graduation Outcomes, and creating an inclusive, quality learning environment. When compared to the ranking from the previous years, it has been seen that in the 'Overall' category, the institute's ranks have shown a fluctuating trend. In 2025, UPES fell 5 ranks to #64 rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking.
One can observe that within the category of 'University', the institute's ranking has scaled up when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, UPES climbed 1 rank to #45 rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.
The institute has displayed a fluctuating trend in the 'Engineering' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, UPES fell 1 rank to #43 rank in the 'Engineering' category by the NIRF ranking.
The institute's ranks in the 'Management' category; have shown a fluctuation when evaluated against previous year's ranking. In 2025, UPES climbed 5 ranks to #36 rank in the 'Management' category by the NIRF ranking.
Check out the latest rankings for other ranking bodies and their categories below.
Read less

outlook.description:
The ranking from Outlook reveals that UPES holds a higher position than many other institutes, showing that the institute is performing well across various factors evaluated by the Outlook ranking system. It has been observed that in the 'Engineering (Private)' category, the institute's ranking has fallen when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2023, UPES fell 8 ranks to #34 rank in the 'Engineering (Private)' category by the Outlook ranking. UPES ranked in the top 50 in the country for the second consecutive year in 2023. Candidates can refer to the table below for a detailed overview of the UPES ranks by Outlook 2023:
Read less

qs_world.description:
UPES has received strong ranks by the QS World University Rankings under the 'Top Global Universities' category. Provided parameters including, Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity and Research, the institute is ranked in a good position as compared to other institutes by the QS World University Rankings 2026. In the 'Top Global Universities' category, the institute's ranks have shown a fluctuation when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2026, UPES fell 100 ranks to #901 rank in the 'Top Global Universities' category by the QS World University Rankings. Throughout the preceding two years, the rank has oscillated but is currently stable.
One can observe that within the category of 'Asia', the institute's ranking has fluctuation when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2026, UPES fell 15 ranks to #163 rank in the 'Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings.
It is to be noticed that the institute has shown a fluctuating trend in the 'Southern Asia' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2026, UPES fell 3 ranks to #24 rank in the 'Southern Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings.
Find below the latest rankings and category breakdowns from several ranking bodies.

hostel_campus.college_name: UPES Dehradun Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: University of Petroleum and Energy Studies has separate hostel for boys and girls with a capacity of more than 2000 students at Bidholi and Kandoli campuses. All the hostels have wi fi facility for learning.Common room has been provided in each hostel for relaxation and 24*7 power back up and solar power water heaters facility is available.The hostels have mess facility.Air conditioned hostels are also available. UPES has also tied up with private hostels for girls students in the city to offer appropriate accommodation outside the campus. All accommodation is on a triple sharing basis.
facilities: Library: UPES library has a seating capacity of more than 400 students and contains over 73,327 volumes of publications including books, standards, reports, proceedings, and more than 150 national and international journals. It also has a rich collection of online resources in terms of CDs, access to specialised portals on oil and gas and power-related information

Hotels: UPES has a separate hostel for boys and girls with a capacity of more than 2000 students at the Bidholi and Kandoli campuses. All the hostels have a Wi-Fi facility for learning. A common room has been provided in each hostel for relaxation and a 24*7 power backup and solar power water heaters facility is available

Cafeteria: The university has a multi-storied food court within the campus, has a number of food courts and cafeterias with a modern ambiance to provide nutritious and balanced meals, snacks, and beverages to students of both campuses
Sports Complex: UPES has a multipurpose playground for playing hockey, cricket, football, and other sports with world-class sports facilities and equipment

library.description: UPES’s library has a seating capacity of more than 400 students and contains over 73,327 volumes of publications including books, standards, reports, proceedings and more than 150 National and International journals in the fields of petroleum exploration, power, infrastructure, chemical, computer, electrical, electronic and mechanical engineering, information technology and management, etc. It also has a rich collection of online resources in terms of CDs, access to specialized portals on oil and gas and power related information. UPES has also acquired institutional memberships of the British Council Library, the American Centre Library, the AIMA Library, the Central Secretariat library and DELNET, IIP, WIHG Dehradun. As a part of collaboration IFP,France has gifted a large no. of books and Shell, a global oil major has also gifted a large number of technical books to the library.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Basketball Court, Volleyball court

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by School of Engineering, UPESReviewed on 31 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Absolutely I am satisfied because of good culture, faculty, and good placement in 2025.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are good, we have a common library, the campus is divided into blocks in which classes are conducted, sports facilities are also good, the college hostel has a limited number of seats so I would prefer an off-campus hostel, but the food in the campus is good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by School of Business, UPESReviewed on 5 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Knowledgeable faculty and support.
reviews.review_text: Everything has Wi-Fi, a good connection, good college life and a view. Hostel life is amazing and has to be seen, and the night view and jamming sessions are the point of attraction.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by School of Computer Science, UPESReviewed on 18 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The college can improve on the placement records.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are fair, sports facilities can be improved, and there are frequent Wi-Fi problems. I went inside the on campus hostel and noticed the rooms are smaller but ventilated well with a good mess. There needs to be more events based on communities outside the college.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by School of Computer Science, UPESReviewed on 18 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Career prospects are strong, though classrooms can feel average.
reviews.review_text: UPES has one of the best infrastructures among private universities in India, but classrooms should have AC. Hostel and cafeteria are decent, the view from hostel is epic. Wi-Fi-enabled labs are advanced, well-stocked libraries. Sometimes you feel crowded in hostel.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by School of Engineering, UPESReviewed on 8 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: So basically, if you are willing to have good placements and be successful.
reviews.review_text: So TBH, I am not living in the campus hostel as the campus hostel serves non-veg food, and I have been a vegan from birth. So I avoid living inside the college campus. But I have seen some facilities and also heard more from my friends, like good infrastructure with good-speed Wi-Fi, properly furnished rooms with no smelly gallery, separate balconies, and many more. Medical facilities and other curricular activities are also available on campus in different places with different rules.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by School of Computer Science, UPESReviewed on 28 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Industry-focused curriculum with great campus life.
reviews.review_text: College offers modern infrastructure with Wi-Fi, labs, smart classrooms, and a rich library. Hostels are safe with decent food, medical care is available 24/7, and the campus has strong sports and fitness facilities for an overall balanced student life.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by School of Computer Science, UPESReviewed on 9 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: UPES 2025 updated information, all about infrastructure, placements, facilities, hostel, etc.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is pretty good, and UPES has its own Wi-Fi named UPESNET. It has a good high internet speed, and also the labs and classrooms are not the same as those at CU, GUE, and other private universities. It has far better infrastructure with a good environment, but when it comes to campus hostel, you are charged a lot higher fees, i.e., Rs. 1,94,000 for a triple sharing room, and the food in the mess is not of that good level. As a student who lived on campus for a year, it was very tough...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by School of Design, UPESReviewed on 16 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Great campus, creative vibe.
reviews.review_text: There are many facilities, classrooms with projectors, design labs, a library, a sports ground, a hostel, a gym, WiFi, an infirmary, a multipurpose hall, cafeterias, and a lot of scenic and creative spaces. I haven't lived in the in-campus hostels, but I've heard they're okay, just overpriced.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by School of Design, UPESReviewed on 16 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Well-built campus providing you the best experience of what college life means.
reviews.review_text: Our hostels are provided with good spacious rooms, electricity, water supply, and water geysers. Food and canteen services are also neat and provided promptly. Medical services are also available when needed. UPES also provides Wi-Fi, has good labs, and tidy classrooms.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by School of Design, UPESReviewed on 16 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Creative campus with supportive faculty and growing opportunities in animation.
reviews.review_text: Our Animation and VFX course has good labs with drawing tables, powerful PCs, Wi-Fi, and projectors. The library has useful books and is peaceful. Classrooms are clean and have AC. The hostel rooms are decent, Wi-Fi is pretty bad, not going to lie, and the washrooms are clean if maintained. Food in the mess is average, but the canteen has better options. Medical help is available 24/7 on campus. There is a sports ground, a basketball court, and indoor games too. Overall, if you stay involved and...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by School of Computer Science, UPESReviewed on 12 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: A good college for a person seeking a nice social life with good studies.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure here at UPES is very nice, all blocks are well furnished with peaceful white theme classes. In campus hostels are good. Since I live outside the campus hostel, I heard that the mess food there is not that good. Hostel has a lot of indoor games. There are many grounds dedicated to every sport. Regular contests and competitions occur for sports.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by School of Business, UPESReviewed on 20 Jun 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Everything is good about this college; what life teaches you.
reviews.review_text: 1Absolutely, the facilities and infrastructure we are getting are very good. I believe there is nothing left that our college does not cover. There are various types of hostels, such as 3 sharing common washrooms, and non- AC which costs - 83, 1,83,000. Sharing common washrooms with AC which costs Rs. 1,93,000. Sharing attached bathrooms with AC which costs Rs. 2,45,000. The hostels are quite expensive; normal-class people can't afford them. Everything else is good. Also, the mess food is good; ...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by School of Business, UPESReviewed on 8 Jun 2025)
reviews.review_heading: My college was overall very good.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are fully furnished and the seating arrangement is good in the classrooms. We had full access to the smart boards and everything in the ventilation system was good. The library was fully furnished, and quiet and comfortable seats were there for 9 hr access every day. The library was centralized. Facilities were good in the hostel. Rooms were fully furnished and connected washrooms were available. Some rooms had air conditioning. The food in the mess was good. There was a convenience s...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by School of Computer Science, UPESReviewed on 2 Jun 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is the best B.Teach college in Uttarakhand.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities here are great. Course facilities are very good, and the department is well-equipped with available Wi-Fi. Labs and classrooms are well-equipped, and the library is excellent. Medical facilities are available at any time, and sports activities happen daily.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by School of Computer Science, UPESReviewed on 2 Jun 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is the best B.Tech college in Dehradun.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities here are excellent. The course facilities are very good, and the department is outstanding. Wi-Fi is available everywhere, and the labs are good. Classrooms are well-equipped, and the library is accessible. Medical facilities are available at any time. Sports are promoted, with games happening daily.

likes.text: Top recruiting companies like  Amazon, Halliburton, Shell, Cognizant, LTI, ITC Limited, Postman.

paragraphs: UPES Dehradun offers Academic Scholarships to eligible students on the tuition fees to support their education. Petroleum Dehradun provides a concession in fees based on scores scored by students in the entrance exam such as JEE Main, JEE Advanced, CUET, CBSE (+2), and exams from other central/ State boards of India. The University offers a variety of scholarships to all students of the University. Some of the UPES Dehradun scholarships with their criteria are listed below:
